I knew Jessica was the attorney I wanted to hire from day one. She is incredibly understanding and truly listens without judgment. She came highly recommended by another law firm, and I can absolutely see why.

Jessica took the time to fully understand my case, explained each step clearly, and always made sure I knew what to expect. What stood out most was her calm and confident approach. She was organized, detail-oriented, and steady under pressure, which made a very stressful process feel manageable.

I always felt heard, supported, and well-represented. Many attorneys work hard, but Jessica goes above and beyond. I would personally and highly recommend Jessica to anyone looking for a dedicated, trustworthy, and EFFECTIVE attorney.
Congratulations to attorney Jessica and her team; they do a great job and are very attentive. 100% recommended.

reviews.text: Great info. Short and sweet power point classes. 1.5 CE without travel. Awesome lunch, good chance to meet and talk with others.

Not ever having had a car accident in my 78 years of life, I had no idea about what to expect after my car was totaled in Dec 2023. Never once did it occur to me to hire an attorney. I was busy going to the chiropractor for my back and knees and shoulder. And it was after a year of treatment that I started working with a physical therapist and personal trainer because I was determined to run a 5K in August 2025. My chiropractor recommended GLP Personal Injury Attorneys and I wasn’t even sure why, because I didn’t see the big picture of what I had experienced over the two years of recovery. Daily appointments, struggling to get my life back to normal, all the while not able to return to full capacity, the pain, the wondering, the change of lifestyle, not being able to work out  or run or even walk without the annoyance of having to sit down often before proceeding. It was however a huge and surprising relief when we hired GLP Attorneys to handle what was brewing in the background with getting the necessary referrals, doctor bills stacking up, payments made but not all of them, and having someone to take us under their wing to ensure we had that burden taken care of. GLP Attorneys were easy to work with, most assuredly experienced in these matters, professional, timely, and approachable, reachable, and very busy working in the background for our benefit. I highly recommend GLP Attorneys and staff. ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️ Linda D Moore

reviews.text:
Please read this review and take this as a warning. Almost all accident/injury attorneys charge 1/3rd of the settlement so please ask your friends/coworkers who they recommend...maybe even call your doctor's office and ask the clerks who the common agencies they deal with instead of using Parke Gordon.

Long story short...my wife got into a car wreck and was injured. I picked Parke Gordon because they had good reviews and were local. Insurance company of the other driver immediately started doing shady things like trying to get us to admit fault and ask my wife how injured she really was to avoid a settlement the day of the wreck- even after referring them to our attorney. They dragged their heals for years, refused to even settle for vehicle replacement even though the other driver was clearly at fault (driver was going about 40mph in a school zone, was on his phone and slammed into my wife from the rear while she was stopped, totaling my vehicle and moderately injuring her in the process).

Just so you know, Parke Gordon might have an office here in the tricities and a paralegal  here but if you talk to an actual attorney it will most likely be from out of state.

End of the story is that the insurance company dragged their heals on time to force a settlement...almost as if they knew Parke Gordon wouldn't take them to court or adequately represent their clients.

Shop around. Call around. Ask around. That's my advice, otherwise it could cost you a lot of grief, time and money.
Good communication. I know it's standard but wished they (lawyers) didn't charge so much.

Everyone at Parke Gordon Law was amazing.  They took incredible care of me, walked me through each step and kept me up to date with personal calls.  It’s refreshing working with a company that is empathetic to one’s situation and understands quality customer service.  I cannot recommend them enough.

Exceptional Attorney and Team – Truly the Best in Benton County.

I had the privilege of working with Ed and his team over the last 2 years, and I cannot speak highly enough of their professionalism, dedication, and integrity. From the very beginning, Ed provided exceptional representation and demonstrated a clear commitment to achieving the best possible outcome in my case. What I appreciated most was Ed’s honesty and straightforward approach. Before each hearing or court appearance, he took the time to explain every possible outcome, ensuring I understood exactly what to expect. He isn’t the type of attorney who tells you what you want to hear, he tells you the truth, prepares you for all scenarios, and guides you with confidence and care. He makes you aware of risks you take going to court and always keeps you mindful of the what ifs. Ed is also very well respected in the courts and it shows. He doesn’t get pushed around, knows the RCWs inside and out, and presents with confidence and precision. When it’s his turn to speak, his arguments are strong, well-prepared, and persuasive. You can tell he truly cares about his clients and fights for what’s right. Especially when it comes to achieving what’s best for your children. His assistant, Amanda, was equally incredible. She was attentive, responsive, and always kept me informed. If Ed was in trial or mediation, she made sure I knew the reason for any delay and that my concerns were still being addressed. Their communication and teamwork made an otherwise stressful process so much easier to navigate. There were several times I reached out with questions on weekends or after hours and still received timely responses, which speaks volumes about their dedication. I can’t say enough good things about this firm. They are truly an excellent team, and I would recommend them to anyone in Benton County needing knowledgeable, honest, and effective legal representation. Worth every single penny you will spend.

I wholeheartedly recommend Ed Shea and his assistant Emma at Shea Law in Kennewick, WA, for their outstanding work in handling my mother's divorce. Ed is direct, highly capable, and a tough negotiator who always followed through on his promises, keeping the process moving smoothly while providing excellent value for her money. Emma was equally professional, offering clear and prompt support that made a difficult time much easier to navigate. Their straightforward and dedicated approach gave us confidence and peace of mind throughout the entire process. If you need a reliable and effective family law team, Ed and Emma are the ones to choose.

Unless you are planning on going to court for $4000 per day on top of his large retainer, absolutely NOT worth $400 per hour. Gave them all the information they needed and they kept emailing (charging per email) with the same questions. When I asked over the phone if he had that information I gave him with the answers he asked, he responded with “I’m sure it’s here somewhere”, also charging for the phone calls. These guys will nickle and dime you!  Once he learned my ex and I had come to an agreement on things, he became rude and my case became unimportant. If you do use him, make sure to check and double check your paperwork, even after explaining things more than once, it was still not corrected!  Horrible experience and couldn’t be happier to be done with them!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Hmmmm. If you want a well-rounded perspective on those clients we’ve represented for decades, we invite you to visit our reviews on avvo.com.

As an aside, at Shea Law we provide all clients with a fee agreement and engagement letter at the outset of every case so all prospective clients can make their own decision to hire us (or not) and to ensure every client is clearly aware of our billing practices, as family law is very expensive. The client can then make the informed decision to proceed or not, with no pressure from us at all. If they decide to have us involved, we, at the end of each month, send their bill to them and explain that if they have any questions at all regarding our work or their bill, we are here to talk that through.

Ultimately, we strive to ensure every client succeeds in their case and along the way, we recommend options, explain the anticipated cost of those options and all clients are then given the freedom to choose the option that works best for them.

Kevin doesn’t just go through the motions — he shows up, he prepares, and he delivers. If you’re in the Kennewick area and need someone who will truly stand up for you and put in the work, this is your guy. I’m beyond grateful for the outcome and wouldn’t hesitate to recommend him to anyone.

reviews.text:
I didn’t think a paralegal could change my life, but then again, I also didn’t think I’d be sobbing & blowing snot into a manila folder on a Tuesday. Enter Erin, an angel sent from above.

I came into that law office a total wreck… puffy-eyed, no coffee, and clutching my nasty Manila folder. Erin greeted me with a smile, a box of tissues, and a pen that actually worked (that alone earned her five stars).

She somehow turned my tear-soaked ramblings into real legal steps. She explained forms like she was narrating a bedtime story (probably because I was acting like a baby), complete with dramatic pauses and “don’t worry, this part looks scarier than it is.”

At one point I made a comment about “falling apart.” And she calmly replied, “That’s okay, I’ve got a stapler.” She has the best snort/laugh. If you want a paralegal who is also a jokester on the side, wow she is it.

I came in broken. I left… stapled together and more supported than I’ve felt in a lifetime.

Thanks Erin!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your wonderful review, Honey! We pride ourselves in going the extra mile for our clients, so it's great to hear that was your experience.

reviews.text:
Before we were recommended to Craig Swapp & Associates, we were devastated to learn that our car, which we were still paying off, had been totaled. On top of that, I was dealing with significant pain from the accident and had no idea where to start. This was my first auto accident, and I felt completely lost. That’s when a family member recommended Craig Swapp & Associates.

From the moment we walked in, they were incredibly attentive. They immediately scheduled a sit-down appointment to discuss the details of the accident. After the consultation, we decided to move forward with them, and we were assigned Lee Peterson and his paralegal, Erin, to handle our case.

Lee and Erin were invaluable throughout the entire process. They not only provided expert legal guidance but also recommended trusted medical professionals, including a physical therapist, chiropractor, and massage therapist, to support my recovery. They made sure I was never left in the dark, always keeping me informed about the status of my case and the next steps. I truly felt supported, reassured, and confident that I would get through this journey.

A special thank you to Erin for her exceptional communication and support. She was always kind, helpful, and understanding, making me feel heard every step of the way. I’m so grateful for the personal attention they gave us—never treating us like just another case or dollar sign. They genuinely fought for us and worked tirelessly to get us the compensation we deserved.

Thanks to Lee and Erin, we were able to secure far more than we could have on our own, which made all the difference in recovering from the accident’s financial and emotional toll. I highly recommend scheduling a consultation with Craig Swapp & Associates—especially Lee Peterson and Erin. They took the stress off our shoulders and handled everything with professionalism and care.

Thank you again, Lee and Erin. Your dedication and support mean the world to us.

Sincerely,
Paige

---

AVOID THIS FIRM! In October 2023, Hoxie was formally reprimanded by the Washington State Bar. If I would have know the past behavior, I would have never hired them. $5,000 to absolutely do nothing, staff are incompetent of communication. Over billing, poor communication, negligence, and documents filed late to the courts. First attorney that took my case left the firm with no communication, until I called 2.5 months later to request a case update. Instead of returning my money for negligence they forwarded my case to Hoxie, who also couldn’t even communicate or do what he was being paid for. 2024-2025 nothing was completed for this case, besides headaches and unprofessionalism. DO NOT HIRE THEM!

I rarely give negative reviews, I believe everyone can have a bad day but at the end of that day, how you treat people, especially those looking to you for help in the field you chose shows your true colors. These people are supposed to help vulnerable people navigate through confusing legal matters but they cannot be trusted. I got matched with Christopher Hoxie through my legal insurance, I called several times spanning through weeks, I never received a call back but did end up getting an answer to one of my many calls, they set me up with an appointment over the phone with him, on that day I waited twenty minutes and called them instead, they put me through with Lori because Chris was out of the office during our scheduled meeting, she was very helpful and insightful but unfortunately not covered by my insurance. I called back as my case progressed to a certain point and managed to get a hold of Mr.Hoxie, he was rude, he did not listen to me, it felt like he was rushing me and he spoke to me as if there was no reason to pursue my case. like it was a waste of time and there was no chance I would win. Every question I asked Mr.Hoxie was answered with a statement about him getting paid and deadlines for getting paid, when I asked him questions about my insurance paying him he brushed me off. I do not recommend this law firm.

Mr. Christopher Hoxie has been my lawyer since October 2020 and he has been nothing but awesome! He has held my hand through my divorce with compassion and knowledge, helped me move back home to Louisiana with my kids, and is still showing up in court for things that come up. I would 10000% recommend using Clearwater Law Firm!
Not great
They had moved so the address was inaccurate. When I made contact with them, it was difficult to set an appointment

Before hiring this firm we did all of the leg work. Documented everything for the court in an organized fashion by date and submitted all of the declarations, filled out the paperwork and even submitted to teh court. Hired this attorney because we felt the court would take us more seriously with representation than without given how solid our case is. Literally handed them the case on a silver platter. Even the attorney stated we did an amazing job and "no need to reinvent the wheel". All they had to do was resubmit the paperwork with them as our representation and the other party was to be served that week. This was in October. Did not hear back from them and asked for an update in November. Was told again they were getting ready to file. No update but we were being patient around the holidays for obvious reasons but we get a letter stating the attorney had left in December and that a new attorney was being appointed and would be in contact. Again nothing from the firm but a notice he was going on vacation for two weeks. Nothing after that but an invoice for February for 600 dollars. For what? They hadn't done anything since October/November. We reached out again and for an update and was told the attorney would call us. At our sheduled appt time the attorney never called. I had to call in to the firm 20 minutes into the 30 minute meeting. The lawyer stated he hadnt even had a chance to look at our case and it was dumped on him after the other attorney left. Then why the 600 dollar charge for February? We were promised a summary by end of week. Nothing. Crickets. Now i get an invoice not only charging us for asking for updates, we were charged for teh full meeting with teh attorney that only lasted 7 minutes. We have now reached a point where our case has been stalled so long, the information isnt even relevant anymore and all of our hardwork on this is down the drain. I asked to dispute the charges mentioned above, no response. We will be ceasing our relationship with this attorney and starting over.

My husband was recently approved for his residence. Maria was our paralegal who helped us through the whole process. She is amazing, very helpful, and well-organized. Thank you Maria

Hello please pay close attention to the comments especially the bad ones because these lawyers are a scam they say they will do the work and all they are worried about is the money for that if they are calling you for payments after that they ask for information even if you send it to them they do nothing and they tell you that they are going to charge you for the calls when you say you do not agree. Two payments of ... 2,500.00 total 5 thousand dollars of which for more than two years I was only able to recover 2,500.00 and they did absolutely nothing no court date really pay close attention they are thieves I looked at some comments and I did not believe it and because I did not pay attention this happened.

If I could give less than 1 start, I would. For full transparency, I was not a client but very close and very involved in the case with someone who was.

They had 3 months and $5000 and failed to filed even 1 thing. Went through the money and then started asking for more when they hadn't accomplished ANYTHING they were retained for. After telling us after they get the information they needed they could file in at most 3 days. They also ghosted for weeks after being asked many times if there was anything else we needed to do and being told no. Then being told "it will be filed Monday" 3 Mondays in a row! They gave no good reason as to why it wasn't filed. Now we have a different lawyer to represent us and the new lawyer said this firm's inaction cost what would have been a very good case for full custody of their children. It's absolutely ridiculous. Being told other cases "take precedents" over the safety of someone's children speaks volumes of what the values are of this law group. Do not use! Avoid at all cost. Especially if it comes to your children. They seem like they just don't care.

Communication is terrible and they are very rude. I wouldn't recommend them to my worst enemy. Moved from person to person with no insight into what they are doing. I had a great experience with Clearwater Law Group. Attorney Chris Hoxie and his staff helped me resolve my case professionally. I would highly recommend them. If I ever need legal assistance, I will definitely hire them again.

Absolutely the worst branch of attorneys and paralegals I have ever come across and a complete waste of time. If I could give them 0 stars I would. I had Christopher Hoxie and he was absolutely awful to work with. I have had a divorce going on for 3 years, and it's only taken this long because I was not well represented even though my ex could not be found. They switched paralegals ALL THE TIME and NEVER communicated. NEVER answered my emails and when I would call, they would NEVER get back to me. Do not waste your time going with this law firm or you will be put in immense debt for absolutely no reason, luckily mine was a legal aid case. The last hearing I had, my attorney didn't even show up too. They don't care about you or your case, they only want money. Stay away.

I hired clearwater law group with no previous experience of the court process. Ms Mendoza was very insightful , explained the entire process, the steps we would take during our case and made sure all my questions were addressed during our consultation. Prices are very reasonable considering all the work & effort that they put into their cases. Even when they aren’t in office they are constantly working on cases; yet they still get back to you in a reasonable amount of time when you have questions & concerns. Unfortunately I did have to sell a vehicle to get the ball rolling but in the end it was worth it. My case went exactly as I was hoping. Thank you Ms Mendoza & everyone at Clearwater law group that helped me during my time as your client.

Save your time and money- Do your homework and don't bother with this scam. My brother-in-law used their services and after 6 months of trying to  get results out of them  to do anything for his divorce, all he had was $20k spent for a typo filled complaint with the wrong name/information on it. They can't make their court dates, constantly reschedule hearings because of their mistakes but charge you for the time, and the only time he ever heard from them was the invoices they sent over and over again for absolutely nothing to show. Don't trust their good reviews (honest bad reviews followed by single post 5 star reviews), they are clearly faked to raise their rating and sucker people into using this low-rate unethical company. Check out their other reviews on BBB, bar complaints, and people suing them in court for their shady dealings.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is the second fake review you post.  You did not use our services.  It is ludicrous to state that we spent 20k in 6 months on a divorce case.  This is completely false as well. We know exactly who is posting these, and ask you politely to delete your fake reviews before further action is taken.  We welcome all client reviews based on their experiences with our office. But not when they are fake.  Your entire post sounds incoherent.

reviews.text:
UPDATE: It has now been FIVE years and instead of updates or phone calls, we keep getting invoices instead of results.
OP: Family hired them to help with a property issue FOUR YEARS AGO and after A LOT of money, nothing is done except hearing "oh, we should know in 2-3 weeks." My mother is out a lot of money with nothing to show except a stack of paperwork and much higher blood pressure. These people have no problem in taking thousands of dollars from an elderly woman and not doing a damn thing.
Run. Don't hire these people for anything.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is unfortunate that this is your opinion of our office, and yet you have not been a client of the firm.  Clients are always welcome to hire any attorney of their choice.  If someone is not content with their current attorney they leave and hire a new one.  If your family (you don't specify who which is very broad) is a client of the firm and has questions about their case she is welcome to call; otherwise your basis has no review because you are not a client of our office.

If I could give this firm negative stars I would. To start off my wife used to work at this law firm, they are the most unprofessional group of people she has ever had the misfortune of working with. The owner Lorena Mendoza is a horrible boss. I can recall my wife calling me crying because Lorena would hold staff meetings and speak to her staff with no respect and would even cuss them out as if they are not human. They would give her loads of work, which is fine of course it’s a job, however they’d expect her to finish it all when most of the time she was the only one doing any actual work because the other person supposed to be helping her was her son who wasn’t even there most of the time because the kid was still in Highschool. Furthermore, the attorneys there have no respect for the staff and they felt that since they are lawyers they can just treat and speak to the other staff as they please when little did they know the only reason why the buisness was running was due to the other staff. Eventually my wife left but having insight on how they treated my wife I felt it necessary to caution others and give you an idea on how they will treat there clients also. Save your money spend it on other firms here in TriCities because they are money hungry but never make the client or other human beings a priority.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is disappointing when former employees have to create fake names, and lie to try to hurt someone's business.  When an employer spends countless hours and money on wages that help support your family. This is a fake name and your statements are completely false, which explains the fake name.  You are not a client and have never been a client.   There are always two sides to the story and then there's the truth.  We wish your wife a better outcome with in a new industry (whoever she may be - if she exists), but please note that wherever you are employed attendance is key.

reviews.text: I would not recommend. After I talked with the LLLT on the phone and paid the initial cost, she went on vacation for a week. I never could get her on the phone through the entire process. She does it all by email. She did some assuming and tried charging me more. Papers were misfiled with the court. I was misled. She made sure to let me know that she has many other clients that need her attention and can take up to 2 days to respond to me. But “call the office anytime if you have questions“ …but…”don’t talk to anyone but me”. Overall the way she handle me and my case was not completely professional. If you want non personal and misunderstandings then she’s the one…otherwise just get a lawyer.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are thankful that you chose our office to help you with your legal needs.  Unfortunately, this is not a platform where we can discuss the facts of our legal relationship with you, due to attorney- client privilege.  Unfortunately, some clients prefer email correspondence, and others prefer in person.  Some clients expect to be called back within a few hours and others understand it may take a day or two for non emergencies.  For any business niche, some clients are happy and some are not.  However, we stand by our work and continue to strive to do what is best for our clients. If you have any questions, or concerns, please feel free to reach out to our office.  We thank you for your business and wish you the best of luck.

reviews.text: This is by far the worst law firm if you can even call them that. That I have encountered. I hired them back in January of 2023 and they have only taken my money and done absolutely nothing they are so unprofessional everyone at that office beginning with the so be called Chris Hoxy and Lorena Mendoza the worst people you will ever encounter in your life. They are so shady and they provide no help. They have my case even worse than it was and I had to encounter an embarrassing moment with the judge he was upset and yelling at Hoxy since he didn’t file any of the paperwork he had to do. Besides that he is not even well represented in the court he smells horrible and his clothes look like they’ve never even been washed. You can never get through them via phone. These people are thieves stay away from them they will just take your money and forget about you. My case has now worsen because of these people and I regret hiring them with a passion. All they will do is infuriate you and make you sick to your stomach. Worst joke firm in the Tri-Cities area!! I repeat for your own sanity stay away from them they are not even attorneys to begin with!! I can go on and on about how bad they are!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback.  We will take it into consideration and implement your concerns, if change is needed.  Navigating through a legal issue is very difficult, and most of the time when people hire the services of an attorney they do so during a time in their lives when they are extremely upset, and we end up getting the short end of that stick.  Like any business, some clients walk away happy and content with the outcome of their case, and others are never happy.  If you have any further questions or concerns, feel free to contact our office.  We wish you the best of luck.

Be careful what you say in front of adam because he will stab you in the back. He works for himself not his clients. If you've got $$$ get someone else. Don't do it you will end up with NEW charges for saying how you feel about being harassed.
Petchel law PLLC is a great Lawyer at Law. Thank you and ur secretary as well.

Adam was just excellent. I had been gaslighted by a company I worked for who forced me to resign. Adam listened to my story and immediately told me  I had a case, the company had blatantly broken the law, and they likely did so because I'm autistic and they thought they could take advantage. He was kind and genuine and super knowledgeable, and I'm so grateful I found him. The cost over 2 years (sometimes the legal process takes a while) was also very reasonable. Far less than I expected to pay. I really can't say enough; he was the only one who listened to me and believed my story. He got a great settlement for me but more than that, he got my dignity and self-confidence back for me.

Exceptional Legal Support

Adam Pechtel from Pechtel Law provided outstanding legal assistance in my case against an employer. His expertise and dedication was seen throughout the process. Adam's communication, both in explaining legal matters and keeping me informed, was excellent. He is not only a talented attorney but also a compassionate individual. Thanks to Adam's efforts, my case had a successful outcome. I highly recommend Adam Pechtel and Pechtel Law for anyone in need of legal assistance.

Within the first 10 minutes of my consulting call I was told that Mr. Pechtel would be unable to assist me in any legal proceeding as he focuses mainly on employment issues concerning large corporations and businesses. He also mentioned that he's only interested in cases in which he knows he'll win, and ones in which he knows that he will get paid (he used an example of a case in which he did 5 years of work only to have a party in the case file for bankruptcy). I wish that he would have declined my meeting after reading my case notes (that his firm requested) and not taken my consultation fee. He had the ability to see would have seen that my case is not against a large corporation or business, and could have redirected me elsewhere.

After working in a law firm and using a lawyer before the lack of empathy that Mr. Pechtel displayed through out our 40 minute call was disheartening. I have been around those in the legal profession previously, and have seen other lawyers treat their clients (and those that are just calling to get an initial appointment) with much more grace and curtesy than I received. No one wants to use a lawyer, and many of us do so as a last resort during a highly traumatizing or stressful time. I'd encourage those who are looking for representation to go elsewhere.
Good customer service

At the initial call, the receptionist wanted to waste my time filling out a questionnaire when I just wanted to know if the lawyer handled a particular type of case.

(Response to the owner)
Or, Mr. Pechtel, you could revise your procedures to have your receptionist have the ability to be courteous by saying either yes or no - or, "I don't know if our lawyer handles that type of case, but I will defiantly ask and have him get back with you..." No. just the questionnaire - to which I say, "next lawyer please..." moving forward.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for leaving feedback. Our firm has procedures in place to protect potential clients. One of those procedures is our receptionist is given simple instructions to ask potential clients to complete the standard form that an attorney can review and avoid giving the potential client any sort of advice. We're sorry this process caused you grief and wish you the best moving forward.
I don’t recognize your name. If we've had contact, please reach out to my office so that we can address whatever concerns you have.

reviews.text: Adam is an honest and principled attorney who isn't afraid to fight for his clients. If you need help with an employment issue, give him a call!

As a lawyer who just finished law school and is currently sitting for the BAR exam, it is my professional opinion that Attorney Craig Walker is not a practical lawyer and who will not objectively do the right thing for his clients.

My grandfather and grandmother were his first ever clients, they both recently passed away with a very simple estate. However, Mr. Walker did not have their home placed in trust which triggered a probate proceeding that was largely unnecessary. If this is how Mr. Walker treats his oldest and most loyal clients of 50 years, I cannot in good faith recommend his services to anyone. There are plenty of good attorneys out there to choose from. His mistake came across as brazen when asked about his failure to effectively avoid probate.

Sadly, many "estate planning" attorney's are actually "probate planning" attorneys as they seek to place their clients in probate in order to earn more fees than would be owed without going to probate. Mr. Walker, in  my professional opinion as a future tax and estate planning attorney, you did Gayle and Ruth a disservice and you should be ashamed of yourself.

What could have been a very unsettling experience became smooth and nearly stress-free thanks to Jason and his team. If you’re looking for a trustworthy, honest, and experienced bankruptcy attorney in Spokane, Jason Couey is absolutely someone you want on your side. reviews.text:
Damn good lawyer helped calm my nerves! Explained the process and walked me thru the paperwork when needed.
Answered all questions in a timely manner as well! Great experience :)
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking the time to share your experience with my office, and my services. It's great to know that you had a great experience with what is often a stressful time in one's life.

reviews.text: Easy & smooth process.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5-Stars! I wish you the best going forward from here.

reviews.text: Jason is quick to respond to emails. Everything turned out as expected. He seems to have the lowest price. He is friendly and informative.
Our bankruptcy was quick and painless all thanks to Jason. We talked with a few lawyers before we decided who would be best fit for us. I would recommend him to anyone even considering bankruptcy.
reviews.ownerResponse: I appreciate you taking the time to write your review, and I thank you for any recommendations you may make in the future. Thank you!

reviews.text:
Jason Couey’s impact is immediate & his value immeasurable!

Jason’s client satisfaction is driven by his transparency, uncompromising customer service and proven method for simplifying the unknown variables when faced with filing bankruptcy.

He is uniquely different from most attorneys I have crossed in my path.  Arrogance and ego do not equate with competency in my book. Jason although competent, has a genuine concern for his clients. I found him extremely approachable, present, and good sense of humor too!  It was so refreshing to work with him as a client.

I was fortunate to have found him during such a difficult period in my life.

Thank you, Jason!!
reviews.ownerResponse: I truly appreciate you taking the time to write such a positive review. Thank you so much for writing about your experience, and for the uplifting praise for not only my legal abilities, but for who I am as a person. Thank you!

reviews.text:
Mr. Couey was superb from beginning to end. He was professional,  kind considerate and respectful. He never made me feel like a failure for declaring bankruptcy.
He explained everything in the beginning and never failed to answer my many questions throughout the process in a very timely manner. If you ever find yourself in need of an excellent attorney, Mr. Couey is who you need to call.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your wonderful review, and for describing the positive experience you had with me, and my services. Much appreciated!

reviews.text: I've had a very positive experience with you, So happy I found you, I appreciate your help and you Thank You so very much💯
reviews.ownerResponse: It was a pleasure helping you through what is typically a very stressful situation. I am happy that it ended up being a very positive experience for you. Thank you so much for your positive/5 star review!

reviews.text: Jason Couey is the best!  He's patient, kind, and gets the job done. He gets back to us quickly and answers all our questions.  Going through bankruptcy can be stressful and Jason eases your mind.  I would highly recommend him to anyone who needs a trusted attorney.  I'm very happy with him and our bankruptcy case. If I could give 10 stars for approval I would.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for the 10-star review! ;) I enjoyed reading your review, and I thank you for the kind and reassuring words. I'm very happy that you had a great experience throughout the process.

reviews.text: Jason was amazing! He was so thorough from the beginning. He discussed the process and answered any questions on our initial consultation. Every step of the way, he was phenomenal. Any questions we had, we received a response back within a few hours. Honestly made this potentially stressful situation a breeze! Definitely recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for describing your experience, and for your words of praise. It is very encouraging to read such positive reviews, and it helps other folks choose who they'd like to call to help them, too. Thank you!
Thank you for the 5-star review!

reviews.text: In the midst of an unsettling and uncomfortable financial crisis, Jason’s responsive and confident communication made this process less intimidating than I expected.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for taking your time to write this review! I appreciate that you chose me to help you through this difficult time in your life, and I'm happy to have been a part of helping you through this. I wish you the best in 2024.

reviews.text:
Mr. Couey was not only professional, but down to earth. He was quick to get back to us with any concerns that we had, no matter how little it may have seemed to us. He was so informative and on top of everything from the beginning. If you're in the position of needing to file bankruptcy, you need someone who you can actually talk to and feel like you won't be judged, this is your guy, you won't be disappointed.
Thank you Jason for all your help and waking us thru this process, we truly appreciate you!
reviews.ownerResponse: I really enjoyed reading your review (and I bet my mom will, too). I appreciate you taking the time to write about your experience with me, and the process. Reviews like this truly help others in making a choice who they want to represent them in times of financial difficulties. I wish the best to you and yours in 2024!

reviews.text: Me and my husband were very pleased with the simplicity of the process to get our affairs in order. Jason was very thorough and clear in what needed to be done. We will be recommending him and using him again when needed.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5-stars, and for taking the time to write me a review. I appreciate you sharing your positive experience despite the circumstances.

reviews.text: Mr. Eddy and his team were very knowledgeable and professional. They took the time to answer all of our questions and explain each step along the way. We would definitely recommend them.
Loren eddy was very helpful and informative. I will recommend friends or family to him.  He helped with my will.
My end of Life Papers were drawn up by Loren Eddy.  He was easy to work with, provided valuable advice, was efficient, fair price (for a lawyer!) and I am pleased with the results.
Mr. Eddy helped my wife and I with estate planning and prepared a revocable trust.  We found him easy to work with and ready to answer questions that arose after the task was complete.
Richard and his team is AMAZING!  Followed thru with everything he said and more.  100% recommend for your personal injury!
Great customer service 👍

I needed to update my estate plan from simple documents prepared from an online kit a decade ago.  Loren Eddy was recommended to me by a friend, and I scheduled an appointment.  We met after he had reviewed my plans and suggested some changes to simplify the disposition of my assets when the time comes.  The estate planning documents and a plan summery were prepared for my review.  My few questions were answered with no changes required.  We met the next week to sign all of the documents.  Having the plan in place has brought me peace of mind.  I will definitely use Mr. Eddy in the future if any updates are required.
This office has held up my family’s estate for the past 3 years with no resolution and horrible communication. Pick anywhere else.
We recently needed to update our trust agreements and were very pleased with the services Loren Eddy provided.  We would certainly recommend him to others.

We are very happy with the prompt and thorough attention paid to our
estate planning issues.
Highly recommend this firm.

My own experience with the Girth-Eddy Law Office was awesome! The professional and caring service offered me support as I worked through my incident. The courteous and ethical standards of this office were top notch and appreciated.

Our questions having to do with our will were answered clearly and Mr. Eddy guided us in making the necessary adjustments to accommodate our changing needs.  Every few years we check in with him to make sure our will is up to date.

Once I decided to get my estate documents in order, I called Mr. Eddy. I had attended a community class he taught on estate planning that was very informative so he was my first, and only call.  He provided me with more documents than I thought I would get but definitely needed.  He answered all my questions and provided even more information to help me.  Everything was done in the timeframe he said and the cost was very reasonable.  I highly recommend Gierth-Eddy Law Offices for estate planning needs.
Loren Eddy made our estate planning easy and patiently and clearly answered all the questions we had. Highly recommend.

Richard Gierth is very helpful and responsive. He has shown great integrity and compassion for his work! Richard has been of tremendous help with my case and has gone out of his way to get me the most help as quickly and efficiently as possible! Thank you Angie and Richard for your service!
The team was able to be successful with my case.   It took a long time but it was worth the time.   I would recommend this office for any legal advice you may need
Mr. Eddy was very helpful and knowledgeable.  Would recommend them to anyone needing estate or will preparation!

I had a very good experience updating my will and all that is involved, Loren Eddy was very helpful, making good recommendations and explaining simply and thoroughly all that is involved.  A good experience with a tough subject!
We had a very professional experience with Mr Eddy.  He was thorough, courteous and took the time to explain the process.

Richard and Angie have amazing personas and show such love to help. They helped guide me on where to go to get help after my car accident. Very personal and caring group. I was taken care of very well and they helped me to get compensated as much as I could be. Definitely would do business with them again if I need it in the future. Keep the hard work up, great job!!!!!

Mr. Eddy was very knowledgeable and made this process super easy.
So relieved to have all my ducks in a row now.

I am a DIY in most things including taxes and real estate transactions. I considered using a ‘free will’ tool online but visited with Mr. Eddy on the advice of a friend. Thank goodness! There were many pitfalls in my beneficiary plans that he steered me clear of including tax issues. For a very reasonable fee I can know feel solid about what I leave behind.

Everyone was kind and gave us the information we needed..
Mr. Eddy helped us three different times with our will...
We feel very secure now that our end of life directions are complete..
We recommend Gierth-Eddy Law Office for all your legal help..

Richard was very professional and worked very hard on my complicated case!  He really went to bat for me and got me the full amount which was a very pleasant turnout for me!  I had heard wonderful things about him prior to my case and all of these things were true and then some!  You should definitely use Richard!  You won't be disappointed!!
Highly recommend for any sort of help with auto accidents. Richard has been very helpful and has kept in touch throughout the procedure.
Appreciate the help I received after my car accident.

I worked with both Adam and Don Out of this firm. They both did good for me. Adam did his best to work and get what I asked for as well as Don did. I unfortunately don’t have the money to hire them again or retain them, but I would love to for ongoing custody things. They are Both pretty easy to work with I would recommend. They really stand up for father‘s rights.

Terrible experience, Don wouldn’t listen to my wants or needs when it came to custody. Even said he didn’t read the proposed custody plan while we were sitting at mediation about to start, charged me for things he didn’t do, wouldn’t respond to any emails or phone calls. I would never recommend him.
Lost my case but gave me a discount and walked me to my truck.

Don Schirm and his team are awesome! Their expertise in family law is excellent! They fight hard to get what you want! They truly care about their clients needs and wants. They listen and communicate well. A special Thank you to Laura, Don’s paralegal for always going the extra mile! They take every matter to heart!
I wouldn’t choose any other law firm but them! I can’t Thank them enough for all they did for me and all the hours they worked so diligently on my case even after hours! If you want to be on the winning team choose them! You won’t be disappointed. They are the BEST!!!
Don is the best lawyer! He actually cares and wants to help his clients. It was a breath of fresh air working with him and his team.

The whole team is amazing! Clear communication, and got back to me within reasonable time every time I had a question, or needed something. Very affordable and will do all they can to ensure you are taken care of. 10/10 would recommend.

Don and his team were really good at communicating with me and making sure all my wants and needs were met. We fought in court for a year and half and Don was able to get exactly what I wanted. He was very fast at responding to my emails and answering all the questions I had.
I highly recommend him if you're trying to get a parenting plan set up.

I cannot say enough about how amazing my experience has been with Don and his entire team. From start to finish, they have been incredibly professional, patient, and understanding throughout the entire process. Navigating family law can be overwhelming, but they took the time to walk me through every step, making sure I fully understood all my options and the legal proceedings.

They were always available to answer my questions, and I felt completely supported at every turn. Their attention to detail and commitment to my case gave me peace of mind during a challenging time. I am beyond happy with the outcome and truly grateful for their expertise and care.

If you're looking for a team that's not only highly skilled but also compassionate and attentive, I wholeheartedly recommend Don.

I met with five attorneys and paid pricely consultations with each of them, except Don, who was a free consult. I ended up booking Don and paid a 5k retainer. What an awful mistake this was - do not take your business here.
reviews.ownerResponse: Ms. Kelm, I appreciate you leaving a review. But you must understand that in order for my business to run efficiently, you have to follow the directions we provide you. Failure to do so results in my inability to effectively and aggressively litigate on your behalf. I wish you all the luck in the future.

reviews.text: If you find yourself in a situation where you need to use their services they are the best around. Don and his team were extremely helpful and professional.

“I went to Don Schirm a few years ago to help with my divorce. It was an ugly divorce against a very vindictive person. Don was there every step of the way. He offered not only guidance throughout the divorce proceedings but also listened to me when I just needed to vent. I have reached out several times since then, and he is always willing and able to help. If you need an attorney for a family law matter, please put your faith in him.”

Do not use Don Schirm as your attorney!!!  I paid a 3k retaining fee. He did not do anything to help with the case. He was unprepared for court after I provided him with everything. They overcharged for everything.  I don’t recommend this lawyer to anyone.
I appreciate Don’s effort and resolution of my case. He goes above and beyond for the best interest of his clients. I highly recommend him.

Don represented my husband in a custody battle that lasted 3 years because of Covid. Thanks to his honesty in billing it was financially possible for us to afford this. He won every hearing and got my husband majority of the custody of his two boys. Not to mention that one of the boys was only 2 months and the other was 4 years old when the battle began. Don always said how he likes to work with his clients and really get to know them. I have worked with other attorneys and all I can say is that a lot of them are in it for the money and hardly communicate with the client. I wouldn’t hesitate to rehire Don if necessary and recommend him on any family case. Thank you Don for that amazing heart you have and all the time and dedication you put in helping your clients needs. God bless you always.
Thank you, Don, for helping me with my case. I appreciate your representation and guidance during this difficult process. Don has made me feel well represented during a challenging time.

Thank you Don for helping me on my case! I’m really happy I came to Resolute Law for legal help. They’ve made me feel comfortable and welcomed during a tough time. If you’re looking for an attorney, Don is the one to go to!

Don has done great and helped me the best way possible with my case and I wouldn’t have figured out the best way to go of my case without him he supported me the whole way through and I appreciate that!
Good people .
I recommend Resolute Law because they have an amazing team and they truly do everything they can to help me. Don is a dedicated and hardworking man.
Don was amazing. He helped with everything i asked and more. his team is amazing and go above and beyond for you. From day 1 he was quick to respond and answer any questions or concerns i had.

I had some trouble with my teenage child. I have had full custody of him for the majority of his life but needed his father to step up and help due to his poor decisions. Don was able to help facilitate communication between my son’s father and I. Despite my differences with the father, Don was able to get everything agreed to and wrapped up without the need to have an ongoing litigation. This not only helped me save money, but helped with my peace of mind as it was a very scary situation and I had no idea what the potential issues I would face legally. Thank you Don for being there for my family, and highly recommend you chose Don to be there for yours when the need arises.

I reached out to Resolute Law as I was in an incredibly dire and time sensitive child custody case. I was so relieved when Don immediately accepted my case (he did a phone consultation right on the spot) and got a continuance so that he could put my case together properly and move forward. My case ended up being incredibly complex and required acute knowledge of the Washington State child custody laws. I believe Don and his paralegal Laura can be a force to be reckoned with, which is what you want when your most precious treasure on earth, your children, are on the line. To say I have incredible gratitude for the work he did on my case is an understatement. I hope Don and his firm continue to expand, grow and help others like myself navigate and walk through one of the most difficult times in a persons life.

Don and Laura have been a blessing to work with! They have excelled at meeting my legal needs, were fair and honest with billing, and went above and beyond my expectations for legal representation. They were prompt to take on my case, worked with me financially, truly listened to my needs, and got my case resolved quickly. It’s so nice to have a down to earth, honest, realistic, and trustworthy attorney!! If I ever need legal help again I will definitely be calling Don and his team. Top notch attorney. Solid 5 stars.

“I was in the middle of a heated custody battle where the father of our child made multiple false allegations against me. Don was able to come in and set the record straight and get me the residential schedule that I wanted. He then was able to resolve the case in a timely matter so I could move on with my life. I highly recommend Don for any of your family law issues.”
I am very happy with the services Don provided me with. I was treated with respect during this hardship and they have great customers service. I am so happy that I came to Resolute law. Thank you!

I consulted with Don Schirm regarding my current family situation. It was nice to talk to an attorney who took the time to understand my concerns being part of the LGBTQ+ community, and the impacts it may have on my case.

I never leave reviews ……… But I’m making a special exception for Don Shirm Jr. We can’t always control life and every situation or road we live ,life happens and the unexpected hit me, I cannot thank Don enough for everything he has done for me and my Family !!! He is are very smart and genuine man.He was very honest with me even from the consultation set the bar for what to be expected from not only from myself but from his part. Don is hands down the BEST family law attorney in Tri Cities , there is a lot of law firms but not any left in the game that are worth the money not only are they overcharging with little to no effort and no results don’t be mislead and just pay for a firm name and past results that are no longer factual, Instead pay for a stand up guy that’s ready for combat Thanks again Don.
Best at what he does, thank you Sherm

First off I’d like to say that Don was amazing in helping me with my case not only did he go above and beyond he won and got me everything I wanted! I strongly reccomend using his law firm you won’t be disappointed at all. I started out a client but he made me feel like family and in a sticky business that meant everything to me and my family.

I was referred to Resolute Law as we needed help in the worst way for child custody hearing that was scheduled in a week!!! To my surprise they said they could see us the same day! Don and his legal aid were so kind and compassionate that I couldnt help but shed tears of gratitude.  They gave us hope and the help we needed! If you are facing a legal situation and need help I would recommend Resolute Law!

“I met with Don because I was worried, I would be getting divorced. He was able to answer all my questions and help me file my divorce. Thankfully, my wife and I were able to stay together. Don then helped me get the divorce dismiss. I am glad I had someone help me during this stressful time.”

I met and hired Don to help my son in his custody case. We had a previous attorney, but my son’s case had stalled due to lack of work on it. Don took over right away and was able to secure a parenting plan that benefited not only my son but his children as well. I really appreciated his honest effort to do what was best for our family. I highly recommend Don.
Very easy to work with! I was able to get responses even on weekends or evenings  if it was an emergency.

Don helped so much when I divorced my husband!! I never knew the process could be so easy, even though the other side was trying to make it so hard! Don and his staff are so helpful and caring. I will definitely come back to this office when I divorce the next one! #singleasapringle #thankyoudonandteam

Don was an absolute saving grace to our family and our custody case. He made the headache of court proceedings an absolute breeze fighting for us, giving us a voice to be heard. He handled our case efficiently and timely. Don is very  knowledgeable, professional and reassuring. He showed so much compassion and empathy towards our family and our case. He was always there when we needed him. He saved our family and for that I am thankful to have worked with him. I would highly recommend Don for your legal matters.
They listen to you and understand everything you are going through. They take the Necessary steps to get you to where you want to be.

meet with him for the first time and he was really understanding and found a great solution for the issue’s I’m facing in an ugly divorce dissolution with children he is willing to jump on my case asap to help me navigate this ugly battle in court and represent me the best way possible this late in the case great with explaining the situation and understanding what needs have to be meet to fix the problems we are facing
Don is a great go-to lawyer for family law, in Tri-Cities.
The worst experience I have had with an attorney. I would not recommend anyone to seek help from him.
Highly recommend this firm! Don Schirm is a fantastic attorney.
He was upfront and honest about the knowledge he had on our issue and how he could actually help and even pointed us in the direction of others when needed. We need more practices like this!
Worked with Don for 3 year to set up a simple parenting plan with no success. Very unsatisfied with the poor comunication. It has been 3 months since I last heard from him.

This guy will tell you want you want to hear just to obtain his retainer but will not actually deliver or follow through with what he says. He has horrible staff turnover which make communication horrible. He would set up meetings to discuss the case just to charge me but never actually do what he was suppose to do. He only succeeded in putting me in a worse situation and a financial strain. As an attorney he should do better by people who are already in a tough situation. Don’t waste your time or money he won’t help!

I can say that Don is one of the best Lawyers that Tri Cities has. If you need someone to fight for your rights as a parent he is the one to go to! The first time I met with him, I explained to him my situation and asked him if he can help me? He said Yes I can. Im so grateful that God used Don so I can get 50/50 custody for the well-being of my daughter.
Don and his team made it possible. Always responding to my calls, texts, and emails.
I highly recommend Schirm Law.
Its been a month and we are unsuccessful with reaching or getting a call back from our attorney.

Highly recommend Don. Ive been going back & forth with this courts stuff for over a year now with my last lawyer when out of nowhere he dropped me without notice & never heard back from him. When I hired Don he quickly picked up where my last lawyer left off same day I got the consultation he started on my case. Plus gave me good advice, modified my parenting plan & finalized orders. Love how quick they are with responding & updating me on my case.

Have had a few different cases I have had to handle with custody , child support , other parties not complying and Don has went above and beyond to help me on all of these cases he takes time to listen to what you are wanting and dosnt charge you up the butt like most do to even ask a question or to speak to you.  He is very understanding and very very good at his job he will fight even when you want to give up ! I highly recommend this law firm and it is the only law firm that I suggest to family and friends . Hope this review helps make your choice on choosing the right guy for the job because it's him!

We went through multiple attorneys for our child custody case and Don is by far the most dedicated and in all, the best lawyer we could have chosen. He always got back to us in a timely manner whenever we reached out to him with questions or concerns, and he literally fought tooth and nail for us. I wouldn’t pick any other attorney in this state, this guy is the best. He had our kids interest in his heart. He’s not just another attorney, he actually cares which made our experience with him that much better. You won’t regret hiring this guy, but you may regret hiring any other attorney in the area.

reviews.text: Tyler Roberts was recommended to me about seven months after I was injured in an auto accident and I was struggling to deal with all the overwhelming challenges and pressures from the insurance companies, while simultaneously being injured and trying to recover. I had never considered that I might need an attorney and I was apprehensive about it. From the moment I contacted him though, Tyler was very responsive, kind, sympathetic, and he took the time necessary to explain things clearly and answer all my questions. And, he maintained that same level of care throughout the entire two-year time frame that it took to settle my case. My case had multiple complications and roadblocks which delayed settlement and Tyler was wonderful about keeping me informed and explaining everything at each step. In hindsight, I could not have gotten through this without him and I would have been much worse off, both physically and financially, if it were not for Tyler. I hope I am never in another auto accident, but if I am, I would not hesitate to contact Tyler again. The only thing I would do differently is that I would call him immediately and not wait seven months. I think he is both a top-notch attorney and an exemplary human being, which is rare. Thank you so much, Tyler, for all you did to help me! I am very grateful!
reviews.ownerResponse: Suzanne, we could not be more appreciative of your glowing testimony with us! Thank you SO much for putting your trust in us and for your patience with this case. We cannot thank you enough for your review!

reviews.text: Tyler Roberts represented me in a personal injury case due to an auto accident. This was the first time I’d ever hired a lawyer and he was very responsive and very patient with me as he explained the process. I had a million questions and he was always very kind and took lots of time to make sure that I clearly understood my options.  He acted as the mediator between me and the insurance company so I could focus on my healing.  He worked in partnership with my doctors making sure that I was fully recovered from the accident before engaging in the settlement  process. Ultimately, he was able to get me three times the original settlement amount the insurance company offered. Thank you Tyler!!

reviews.text:
I cannot recommend Mr. Marchi and his team highly enough. From the start, he handled my case with honesty, transparency, and care. I was originally sentenced to 135 months for a conspiracy drug trafficking charge. Thanks to Mr. Marchi'’s hard work and expertise, he successfully reduced my sentence through a two-point reduction and later secured my compassionate release, shaving off an additional fourteen months. In total, I ended up serving approximately sixty-eight months, about half of my original sentence.

Not only was Mr. Marchi incredibly professional and trustworthy, but his staff was equally impressive. They were dedicated, efficient, and supportive throughout the entire process, ensuring that everything was handled promptly and thoroughly.

Throughout it all, Mr. Marchi never once lied to me or gave me false hope. He was always upfront about my situation, and I truly felt I could trust him every step of the way. His dedication and professionalism made all the difference, and his work has given me a second chance at life.

If you’re looking for an attorney with a hardworking, compassionate team who will fight for you and treat you with respect, I highly recommend Mr. Marchi. He is the real deal.

reviews.text: I actually don’t know much about the services This form provides but as I only had a consultation with this firm, there I feel obliged to put down my review. I received a call at 1645 while I was driving After waiting the entire day for that call. As I was driving, I told the assistant that I will call back as I am driving right now. I then tried to find a spot on the highway to stop and call back as i was told by the assistant that you will have to call back before 1700hrs as we close at 1700hrs. Then I told myself then why would you call me 15 minutes to your closing time!? Anyway, I called and was charged for the consultation & after the payment was made, the assistant told me that you will have to call us at the time of your appointment! So basically they don’t call you but you have to call them😏 Finally I made a call at the time of my appointment where i was told that the lawyer is busy with another appointment, please call back in a little while. Then I called back again after few minutes. And guess what? My consultation took only 5 minutes😏 which is why I decided to go look for another lawyer. Sorry but this is my experience which made me feel that the level of seriousness is very low and I needed someone with passion and complete interest in my case, who could ask me further questions about my case and show me a little attention to detail. . Money doesn’t matter to me!

I have been working with Kristi McKennon for nearly 2 years on my personal injury case and we just wrapped things up today.  My experience with Kristi and her staff was excellent from beginning to end.

In the beginning, I was hesitant to hire an attorney but was encouraged to look into it because of the complexities of my case. Kristi and her office was recommended to me by a colleague as a firm that has a great reputation and does right by their clients in court.

I knew from the first phone call with Kristi that we made the right decision. On that call, Kristi offered to meet at our home if it was more convenient for us due to the nature of my injuries and because she knew we had young children. She gave us her cell phone number and promised she would always be available throughout the entire process. Her level of client care remained that high the entire time.  Today as I left her office we joked about how many times her and I have spoken on the phone, sometimes 2 or 3 times in a single day. She would call me with updates, to explain next steps or just to check in. Never once did I feel like I was unsure of where we were at in the process. From beginning to end, there was total transparency of what was happening with my case.

Brenda Macias, Legal Assistant, was so incredibly responsive to any issues with medical billing.  I have so much appreciation for Brenda’s promptness with handling the hospital, ambulatory services, doctors offices and three different insurance companies.  Brenda’s efforts allowed me to focus on healing and recovery and undoubtedly saved me hours of phone calls fighting to get my bills paid.

In addition to the exceptional client care I received, the outcome of my case was equally as good. Kristi’s efforts in fighting on my behalf with two different insurance companies resulted in a settlement much higher than I had anticipated and without ever having to go to trial.

Flynn Merriman McKinney truly is an honest, thorough and compassionate firm.  I am grateful to have had them on my team and cannot recommend them enough.

I hired Skyview - Glen Myers for a custody case after separating from my children’s father following a domestic violence arrest. I have had sole custody for nearly a year, have been paying all expenses myself, and had to move. I needed an attorney who would fight for me and help stabilize my situation. Instead, I spent nearly $25,000 if not more and got very little in return.

The modification to the protection order and child support process dragged on so long that I ended up initiating and setting up parts of it myself. Because of the cost and lack of progress, I never even got a parenting plan submitted to the court.

Throughout the case, I received frequent threatening emails warning they would drop me as a client if I didn’t pay immediately. The volume of mail and billing notices was overwhelming and difficult to track. Even while I was on a payment plan that made it hard to cover basic living expenses, I was repeatedly pressured to provide thousands more on short notice to maintain the retainer.

I understand legal fees are part of the process, but there was little sensitivity to my financial reality or urgency of my situation.
When I expressed how desperate my financial and custody situation was, I felt there was no real advocacy for me. The court process continued to drag on, and my request to handle child support through DSHS to save money was not meaningfully addressed.

If you hire this firm, be prepared to be VERY financially comfortable, comfortable with a lawyer who may not aggressively fight for you, and comfortable with a team that showed me zero compassion during a domestic violence custody situation.

Ironically, my ex’s attorney—who is defending him—has been far more responsive and compassionate while I’ve been submitting documents myself. That alone should tell you something.

Beware, I’m in financial ruin because of this company, they took me for everything they could ran up the bill in a short few months. Paid a massive retainer thinking I was set for a while.. when I say massive I mean twice what I’ve ever been asked for. And it only lasted a few months with no work being done. Then instead of telling me I ran out of my retainer they just sent me a 7000 dollar bill saying they went over and I owed them another 7k. I’m really disappointed in this company I had a good feeling in the beginning but it was wrong. Please stay away

After a six-year, highly contentious custody battle, my husband sought counsel with Skyview Law. As an unmarried, out-of-state father, securing even standard visitation was an uphill fight. Jarrod applied thoughtful legal strategy and unwavering, timely persistence to navigate the court system on our behalf, ensuring the children’s safety and that every detail of our interests was clearly presented. Ultimately, my husband was awarded custody of his children. They now live out of state with us, and the mother’s visitation is restricted to our state of residence. She also has an active restraining order and is responsible for all travel expenses. This outcome would not have been possible without the precision, dedication, and timeliness with which Skyview Law represented our family.

Experience here was pleasant and their assistance was simple enough, case took a month longer then expected but everything went through just fine in the end with minimal issues. Thank you for your time, Cyrus Kotenai & Brenda Alvarez.
I can't complain, they do a job.

Very polite keeps you informed  understands your situation just let them know and they will work with you and your schedule and situation as well . Very professional yet down to earth I like how they keep you informed a long the way ,billing is clear and fare .

Mr. Hays and the professional staff at Skyview Law were compassionate and strategic with their counsel during a difficult time.
Navigating a child custody issue was one of the most stressful experiences of my life, but Mr. Hays guided me through it with grace and clarity. They listened to my concerns, protected my interests, and always kept my children's best interests in mind. I felt supported while maintaining my goals I shared of respect and professionalism for all parties involved. While using a lawyer was my last resort, it was used appropriately and effectively to solve the issues and restore proper family law with class. I am excited to use the many other services Skyview law offers in the near future. Thank you.

I absolutely love Cyrus and Brenda. They made everything so much smoother. They listened to my concerns and requests. They explained the process of my court case. Cyrus was an absolute pitbull in court! He put the opposing lawyer in her place and through facts at her fiction. Brenda did an amazing job on all the paperwork and helping proof read my declarations. She was a joy to work with. Well they both were! I am so very grateful for Skyview Law. Cyrus and Brenda, I can't thank you enough for all that you have done. I will be using them in the future for sure! Thank you again!
Great attorneys and staff

Before reaching out to Mr. Hays, I had been actively trying to secure visitation with my children for two years. As an unmarried father living out of state, the process was especially difficult and costly.

What stood out to me about Mr. Hays when I sought his legal guidance was his honesty regarding our chances of gaining custody. I appreciated his commitment to ensuring that our resources were used effectively toward meaningful outcomes.

Over the past three years, we've made significant progress due to his legal strategy: we established visitation, obtained a restraining order to protect the children from their mother—which has since been successfully renewed—and ultimately secured custody of my children, who have now been living with me in Colorado for a year and a half.

If you're a father looking to pursue visitation or custody, I strongly encourage you to consider working with Skyview Law.

Honestly the best experience I had with this  firm Mr hays is excellent lawyer he doesn’t waste time and he gets things done when it comes to family law he’s your lawyer!!!

While staffing issues or scheduling gaps can occasionally occur, it’s our responsibility to ensure our front office remains welcoming and responsive at all times. reviews.text: I would never recommend this law firm to anyone. They have threatened her now 3 times right before court hearings to come up with big lump sums of money or they wouldn't show up for court. This firm has not accomplished anything but making it impossible to finish her divorce.  The stress with this law firm is worse than the stress of the divorce.  This firm said we could make payments and now they are not excepting payments.  This firm knows my daughter is tapped out working 2 jobs and all they care about is getting more money up front . Save yourself heartbreak and go somewhere else. My daughter is more than willing to make payments but again this firm will not take them after getting $16,000 dollars of her money. This firm grossly abused their power in her desperation.
reviews.ownerResponse:
You were never a client, Ms. Tapp. Our firm policy is to honor agreements we make, including the engagement agreement signed by us and our clients at the beginning of every case. We do not violate that agreement.
Part of that agreement is for our clients to maintain a balance, called an advanced fee deposit, in their trust account, against which we work to earn the money. Complex cases are always more costly than simple cases. That's why we talk with our clients about budgeting and what is possible to achieve with the funds they have. We work with them to get good results based on their resources.
If a client struggles, we encourage them to talk with parents or other family about helping them provide the funds, seeking personal loans from the bank, credit cards, or something like a go fund me account.
Other firms are willing to extend credit to their clients by allowing the amount owing to run into the tens of thousands. Once the case is finished, they often file leins against property, sue their clients, and obtain judgments. This allows them to seize property and garnish wages just like any debt collector. So rather than taking advantage of someone, we simply withdraw as agreed to in the engagement agreement before the client owes us thousands of dollars.

reviews.text:
I hired OlsenDaines for my bankruptcy case in 2025. I would not recommend them, after my experience.

TL;DR: My lack of confidence in OlsenDaines' data management and organization, as well as staff training and communication, is why I can't recommend them.

Your priorities may be different than mine, so here's a breakdown.

__The Good:__
They allow you to pay in installments.

Total cost was in line with the standard/average (just over $2,000).

The lawyer himself was competent, attentive, and personable. We only met once (to review and sign documents), and he ensured that documentation was comprehensive and that I knew what to expect.

There was follow-up after the trustee meeting, so I didn't have to wonder.

__The Bad:__
I've never dealt with a more chaotic and incompetent office staff.

I started off with one assistant (who requested a specific set of documents from me), then a month later was handed off to someone who appears to be disconnected from the process entirely.

This person was unable to track what items I'd sent and which I needed to send. Every few weeks, they'd email saying they needed something which I'd already sent. When I pushed back, they'd say they needed something else, totally different, now.

They'd ask for things that didn't apply to my case, I'd explain why I couldn't provide those, they'd say OK....then 3 weeks later ask for that same thing.

They didn't understand what they were asking for, or why. "The lady who does our filing said so" was the answer on more than one occassion.

This meant that I was repeatedly forced to do work they could (and should) have done, like list out every paystub I submitted to them on a spreadsheet, which it turns out they didn't actually need.

Even after I paid in full and submitted all the documents requested, they delayed filing and continued to ask me to submit more things (including items I'd already submitted). So apparently the person asking for sensitive personal information didn't have visibility into the data they'd already collected. If they don't have established processes and tools to manage my data, I assume they also aren't protecting it.

I was handed off to yet another person after the filing, to sign paperwork. And yet *another* person sent me an update on the case and asked me to leave a review.

None of these individuals are who I spoke with initially on the phone, when I hired OlsenDaines. None of them explained why I was being handed off to them. And none of them laid out what to expect from their office during the process--so each handoff was a worrying surprise.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the feedback Beth, it is truly appreciated.  We are working on the staffing issues and making sure the processes are in place to make things go much smoother moving forward.  In the end, I'm glad we were able to get you across the finish line with the results you were looking for when you first contact us.  We wish you the best of luck in the future!
