I couldn't believe how much they cared about what I have been going through and treated me like I was a family member and I knew that all the online reviews were true. Mr. Hatfield and his team have have shown time and time again that they really care not only about the client but the clients families too! I won't find out the judges determination for a couple of weeks,  but I was really blown away by his knowledge during my hearing!  What he and his staff deal with on a daily basis has to be heartbreaking at times because they really care for the clients and I hope even if the outcome isn't good that they never lose their compassion and empathy. That combined with Mr. Hatfield's knowledge of the system and the laws makes this the only disability lawyers office that I would reccomend to anyone. I know he worked really hard on my case and I know he really is the best lawyer that I could have ever hoped for. If you need a disability lawyer,  look no further.  Just call for a consultation and you will see why all his clients love him and his team.  You really won't find anyplace else that cares this much about you and will fight this hard for you ! He is absolutely the best disability lawyer around and we are blessed to have him right here in our own backyard.  And to Mr. Hatfield and his team,  thank you so much for being who you are and fighting so hard for me. The holidays were closing in and he asked if he could research the situation and get back to me in a few weeks (after Christmas), which was not a problem at all. That was the last time I heard from him. In regards to employment law, he did not appear to be clear and concise in his knowledge and abilities. In a nutshell, I paid to tell this gentleman about my problems and never received a simple answer if any state employment laws had been violated. I found the experience to be of no value and I would discourage anyone from considering this attorney for employment legalities.

DO NOT HIRE THEM whatever you do. If I could give this law firm a zero rating, I would. Absolutely the worst experience with a law firm I’ve ever had. At first, they seemed really kind and compassionate the lady who answered the phone Carla was very sweet and understanding with the tragic loss and probate we were dealing with and I did a meet and greet with the attorney. I was going to have over Zoom and he was amazing so I decided to hire the firm specifically to hire Bis Pierce. Then, As soon as I paid my retainer and they started, mistakes started happening. There was multiple mistakes on the documents. They were going to send out to the judge. That I caught them on, and then I found out they didn’t put my case with the attorney I originally hired I asked them to make sure he was the one taking care of things. I tried communicating in the portal. I never got answers. I struggled getting any communication with them So at one point, I just emailed my attorney directly and he said if if I needed answers quickly just to go that route instead of using the portal so that’s what I started doing. We were in the four month creditor window, so I took a step back and focused on my daughter and her graduation during this time. After a few months I reached out to Mr Pierce to ask what creditors had come forward and that’s when he informed me he no longer worked for Evergreen and elder law and hadn’t for about six weeks and they were supposed to inform me that he left and who my new attorney was which was not done. I called the office to find out not only he’s gone, but so was Carla and I ask for them to transfer my case over to Mr Pierce Because that’s who I originally wanted to work with, and because they didn’t inform me that I had a new attorney working on my case and had no transparency of the problems within their office. They agreed to transfer but then  more problems arise, we find out the creditors had not been properly informed And their answer was that there paralegal just got fired also. so in a few months since I started probate everybody that I worked with no longer works in that office and the blame just Got shifted around. I asked for a refund for the remainder of my $6000 retainer and the complete transfer to my original attorney. They refunded me $114 out of that $6000 when they did about 10% of my  probate and in that small amount of work that they did everything had to be corrected and redone because it wasn’t done correctly. We are going through probate because of the sudden and tragic loss of my teenage daughters dad and they made an already heartbreaking situation a complete nightmare DO NOT HIRE THIS FIRM YOU WILL REGRET IT. I will be filing a Complaint with the bar

reviews.text: My brother-in-law passed away in August of 2024. My sister has dementia so my husband contacted this firm to establish a POA for me to handle the estate. There were current wills so basically not much needed to be done but Evergreen insisted that probate was required. My husband and I handled the estate and selling of all properties. Many thousands of dollar later - Evergreen is asking to replenish the retrainer even though everything has been sold and no debtors. I was very disappointed in the service we received and the cost was beyond questionable. Do not recommend!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback, Debby. While we cannot speak publicly about the details of specific matters due to confidentiality and ethical obligations, we do want to provide some general clarity.

In Washington State, the probate process is governed by strict legal requirements that must be followed, regardless of how simple or straightforward a case may seem. These requirements can sometimes make the process feel lengthy or overly complex, but our firm is obligated to ensure full compliance with state law at every step.

We understand that legal processes—especially during times of loss—can feel frustrating or confusing. Please know that our goal is always to move matters forward efficiently while still meeting all the necessary legal obligations.

If you have further concerns, we encourage you to contact our office directly so we can address them in a more personal and productive way.

reviews.text: Mother in law found them online. Appeared reputable. We meet with the managing partner in may of 2024. To set up a trust for her and her husband.   Paid nearly 8 grand. It is now February 2025 still have not received the trust. I had to plead to get powers of attorney for father in law in October 24 as he was facing surgery. The firm kept promising we would have the trust next week. Obviously that never happened. When we originally met it was 5 family members and the managing partner. We explained what we were looking for.  My family has had one for many years.  I even provided them with a copy of it.  One daughter loves ves in the mid west and couldn’t be there. When in August we received the draft they had disinherited her. NONE of us had asked for nor wanted that. They then said  we would need a different type of trust. I again sent a copy of my family’s trust. Was told I would have a draft in two weeks. Legal assistant kept changing. Week before thanksgiving we still had not received anything. Except POA documents. NO trust. As the designated point of contact I spoke with Maaging partne advised we wanted $5000 refunded as she had said POA documents cost 2500 at original meeting. She said she would be in touch after the holiday. She then sent a letter to in laws stating the firm would no longer speak to me. First part of December my Mother in law called and asked again for a refund.  They have not responded to several requests since then. I have looked at review since that show a pattern of collecting funds and not providing services. Have NOTHING TO DO with this firm RUN.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Thank you for your feedback. While we cannot discuss the details of any client matters in public reviews, we do not show you as a client contact of record. Our firm upholds strict policies and agreements regarding our services to ensure professionalism and clear communication.

We are committed to assisting our clients directly and maintaining a respectful environment for our staff. When we receive communication that includes unprofessional or abusive remarks, we do not continue engagement in that manner. However, we always strive to work directly with our clients to resolve any concerns.

If your parents are clients of our firm, we encourage them to reach out to our management team directly at info@evergreenelderlaw.com, and we will be happy to assist further. Any possible refunds will be handled in accordance with our fee agreement.

— Evergreen Estate & Elder Law

reviews.text: If I could give this firm 0 stars I would. We hired this law office for a probate case, initially everything was fine. However, a month later our attorney quit and the firm withdrew from our case. Additionally, staff was not responsive and overall not helpful. It took the firm almost two months to return the money that was required for them to start working on our case. The work that was done was not substantial and absolutely not worth the money spent. Dealing with sudden death of a love one is difficult enough, and having a firm that promises you support at the beginning and then turns their back on you is unprofessional, insensitive and overall pathetic. I would absolutely not recommend and do not trust.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Nathaly, thank you for sharing your experience with us. We’re truly sorry for not meeting the standards you expected and for any added difficulty during a challenging time. At the time of your case, we were undergoing significant staff changes, and we recognize that this impacted the quality of our communication and responsiveness. We are actively learning from this and taking steps to improve.
In regard to the refund, we want to clarify that we issued it within three weeks of our withdrawal, which is within our standard timeframe, though we understand it may have felt prolonged given the circumstances. While we cannot change your experience, we are committed to making adjustments and doing better for our clients moving forward. Thank you again for your feedback; it helps us grow.

reviews.text: My family and I chose to work with Evergreen based on good reviews. We needed help with my uncles unexpected death. Initially everything went great and we were really happy with Conor. Once we arrived in WA to get the paperwork in Kennewick, where we were staying we were told that our meeting AND necessary paperwork were in Spokane, 2 hours away. Our initial call DETAILED that we would be in Kennewick and Richland and needed for our time there. So you can imagine our surprise that these things were in Spokane. This is about the time that Hannah lacked communication skills. Calls made from my cousins phone were ignored yet calls from mine were answered which shows me they were ignoring her. We will NEVER recommend this company. In a time that we needed help, they added to our stress.
reviews.ownerResponse:
Jessica, thank you for sharing your experience with us. We are deeply sorry to hear about the challenges you faced during such a difficult time. Your feedback is extremely important, and we genuinely regret that our service did not meet your expectations.

We understand how crucial clear communication and accurate arrangements are, especially during sensitive situations. We sincerely apologize for any confusion or inconvenience caused by the mix-up with the meeting location and the issues with our communication.

We wish you had reached out to our firm administrator directly, as we would have made every effort to address your concerns and rectify the situation. Your satisfaction is our priority, and we are committed to improving our services based on your valuable feedback.

Please feel free to contact our firm administrator at info@evergreenelderlaw.com, as we would like to understand more about your experience and find a way to make things right.

reviews.text:

Update: set up oppointment to go to office, not at all what it’s been told during webinar. Marissa said that she can make it happen even if I am out of state and all my assists are not in Washington state. When I went to office in Kennewick, the guy who welcome me( very nice and pro) was surprised and had to call her to confirm that she is licensed in Texas to make the estate planning. In the med, she was not. Not only I lost half day job to go to the Kennewick office but lying to future clients is just a start of bad reputation. Not recommend based on Marissa promises and lie. Too bad you lost a good costumer and good for me saved money!
reviews.ownerResponse:
Dina, thank you for sharing your thoughts about our Estate Planning 101 workshop. We're happy to hear you thought it was time well-spent.

Update: Dina, we apologize for the misunderstanding. We are licensed in Washington, Oregon, and Idaho only, and we do not falsely advertise that we are licensed to practice law in any other states. There are instances in which we could work with a resident of a different state regarding a legal matter taking place in Washington, Oregon, or Idaho, but we cannot create an estate plan for residents of any other states.

In 2014, I experienced a pretty significant auto accident that really impacted my life. Unsure of how to proceed in the legal sense was beyond frustrating and partially frightening. I pride myself in being able to do things on my own but once I started recieving push back from the at-fault party, I knew I would need profressional help. I was referred to Anderson Law for legal aid and I am glad I did. Brian was extremely helpful in providing me information before proceeding, he was very upfront and made sure to cover all the bases, no judgement and provided reassurance about our case. The consultation really helped me see how much this law firm had in experience and knowledge. My case was handled by Edwardo Morfin, and he really did more than I could ask for. He really took care of my case, attending to many of my BILLIONS of questions and phone calls...and promptly getting back to me. Edwardo tuly went above and beyond for my case. He not only is a jovial person and actively engaged in making his community better, he provided me the support and services I needed without pressuring me to make a decision. His work helped me get the help I needed and more. Plus he provided me with a trustworthy person to refer family and friends to if they were ever in need. I definitely would recommend Edwardo to family and friends for similar needs, matter of fact I have recommended them. Thank you to Anderson Law and a special thank you to Edwardo for staying on top of my case, handling it for me yet still keeping me updated. You are a good person AND a great lawyer to have on the team, especially when it came to my case!! Keep up the good work!

Falsely accused of DV as the court tend to believe the women in this case i was attacked and when the cops came the agressor played the victim anyhow i payed hoping that betancourt law would help me in this csse but sadly he even accused me and saying it doesnt sound very good for you with threats of jail. reviews.ownerResponse: Due to a confidential conflict, and in keeping with our firm's ethical standards, my staff and I are unable to provide specific details. I can tell you we notify people as soon as we find a conflict. We sincerely regret the inconvenience and thank you for your understanding.

reviews.text: Hello, Betancourt Law, PLLC impressed me from the very start when they answered the phone upon my initial contact unlike other law firms that did not even return my phone calls. Angel and his team were professional and courteous throughout the whole process by listening to my concerns and answering them in a clear and concise manner. I also appreciated Angel and his teams knowledge and understanding of the laws and the judicial system to utilize every resource and tool when going to court.  I would recommend Angel and his team to anyone searching for a top notch law firm.
Angel was a great help through a very difficult time. I can not recommend him enough if you are in need of an attorney.

I just want to give a BIG thank you to Adrianna and our attorney Ty! They both were so helpful during our adoption case. Both of them were  very professional, friendly and helpful. They made this process such a breeze for us. I would recommend them to anyone.
Quick and Courteous service. Highly professional and knowledgeable. Excellent defence lawyer!!! 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟
Jared is our lawyer. I highly recommend him. He's very good at his job.
I recommend bentancourt law there good they take the time to talk to u Tyler and Adriana work together and they are a good team and professional
Angel and his team kept me informed and worked hard to help win my case. I would highly recommend him to take your case if you want to come out on top.

Betancourt law helped made a very stressful situation into something easily manageable.  Aimee was the first person I had an encounter with. She was very pleasant understanding and she was able to get me in quickly for a consultation with Angel. After speaking with Angel I felt more comfortable, prepared  and he was able to inform me on different possible outcomes. I highly recommend their law firm, for any legal issues you may run into. Everyone was are very upbeat, positive and supportive.

ANGEL was who I was referred to. I was highly disappointed in what Angel had to offer. Didn’t really explain much and seemed as if it was easier to just say “GUILTY”?  Maybe it was just a bad day for him but he is getting paid no matter what. I feel bad that his knowledge wasn’t there for the programs being offered. Just acted like he didn’t have time.
reviews.ownerResponse: Consults in General: I don't lie in consults to sell. I also answer as many questions as I can. I strive to make people feel better than when they walked in. However, I can't always agree and get along with everyone.  When I don't agree with people I recommend people get a second opinion. Generally, if I don't want a case it could be because of a conflict of interest, conflict of personality, and a number of other factors. I try and bring my "A" game as much as I can either way. Though, sometimes my "A" game is not there. I don't make excuses for it though. I don't let reviews slow me down either. I toughen up and bring it on the next consult. -Angel

reviews.text: They where very explainable in every thing I asked. Awesome people.

I retained Branden Landon when charged with a domestic violence misdemeanor assault & I highly recommend retaining him as his knowledge, experience & sensitivity ultimately got my case dismissed.  Outstanding lawyer.

Betancourt Law has the best attorneys in town! Branden was very attentive, respectful and very courteous. He was able to get my documents notarized with short notice. I will recommend him and his team to my family & friends. 5/5!!  Thank you Branden!

Been calling for over 3 weeks they have not returned our calls they have taken our money lied to us about knowing the laws we had to look up the laws for them and when we went to there office to confront them about how they messed up they had another lawyer trespass us off the property so they did not have to deal with us I even asked him to go away from me as I was standing out side holding my child as he aggressively raised his voice at me and was disrespectful to me with my child in my arms after they said they fixed the issue they created in the first place there are extra charges popping up on the back ground now preventing me from working now and they told me it’s out side of there scope
Great attorneys, great team! 5/5 Highly recommend. Amazing to work with and the results are better than you could hope for.

Hayden Sebald was amazing with our case. He was attentive and always answered all of our questions and made sure to keep us calm during our entire process.

The Stephens

He was always honest, upfront and helpful. The whole team was great and easy to work with I highly recommend these guys. I know I’ll continue to use them in the future.

Angel & his entire team are phenomenal. They are willing to help & support you & your family every step of the way. Generous with their time & wisdom, I highly recommend them ALL. From scheduling to communicating and giving their devoted attention to you & your loved ones. They are there for you 100% Best attorney team in town!

Brandon at Betancourt Law was not only extremely professional but efficient. His customer service was responsive and awesome. Mostly due to the fact he was able to get my fine so significantly reduced with the judge. The law office is a very respectable establishment and I appreciate all of Brandon’s help. Thank you Bentancourt! -Joey Fleck

I truly don't know how I would have made it through my divorce without Mason Pickett and the entire team of Pickett Law. From day one, they were not only incredibly professional and knowledgeable, but also genuinely compassionate and supportive during one of the most painful and challenging times in my life.

Mason and his team were always there when I needed them, answering every question, keeping me informed, and making sure nothing slipped through the cracks. Their dedication and attention to detail gave me peace of mind when I needed it most. But more than that, they truly cared. I never felt like just another case. I felt heard, respected, and supported every step of the way.

Thanks to their guidance and tireless work, I was able to get through this chapter with strength and clarity. I'll be forever grateful to Mason Pickett and everyone at Pickett Law. If you are going through a difficult legal situation, you could not be in better hands.

I spent over $20,000 with attorney Mason Pickett and got nothing out of it. He Complicated my case much worse with his awful mistakes and very poor decisions. Extremely expensive attorney that generates no results whatsoever. Appears to be confused, lost and never  ready nor prepared before any hearings. Constant mistakes and poor decisions on his part. Full of big talks and empty promises! Unusually careless and forgetful attorney who very often forgets to file very important and crucial documents with the court before court hearings which ends up hurting your case. A complete nightmare, a complete waste of time and money! A greedy attorney who burnt out a long time ago but still driven by greed to collect a lot more money from clients without producing any results. Do not trust this attorney with your family law case because you will end up going completely bankrupt and the outcome of your case will not be in your favor!
reviews.ownerResponse: I'm sorry you felt that your case was not handled in the manner in which you anticipated. If you had reached out during the course of your case, we could have resolved any of your concerns or questions at that time. Please feel free to reach out directly to our General Manager, Kelly Bennett, to discuss your concerns in detail. While we obviously can not guarantee how the court will decide a case, we work tirelessly to ensure our client's cases are presented completely and accurately.

reviews.text: Could not have asked for a better team between Mason and Kayl (paralegal). It took a lot of time and work, but they got me where I wanted to be and were so patient and helpful every step of the way. Highly recommended- especially if you have children involved in your situation.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your kind words. Mason and his staff work very hard to give his clients the very best assistance he can provide in family law matters.

reviews.text: I worked with Mason for several years fighting for custody of my daughter. From day one Mason was straightforward and honest about my potential outcomes. His straightforward manner was very refreshing.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the feedback. We sincerely appreciate you taking the time to express your positive experience. Any family law matter can be stressful. Mason and his team work hard to help his clients navigate through their journey.
Thank you for the positive feedback. We sincerely appreciate it!

reviews.text: I recently had the privilege of working with Mason on a custody case, and I cannot recommend him highly enough. From our very first consultation, it was clear that he genuinely cared about my situation and the well-being of my child. Masons expertise in family law was evident as his team  navigated the complexities of the case with professionalism and compassion. Throughout the process, Mason was always available to answer my questions and provide support, ensuring I felt informed and empowered every step of the way. His strategic approach and negotiation skills truly made a difference in securing a favorable outcome. If you are facing a custody dispute, I wholeheartedly endorse Mason as a dedicated and effective advocate for you and your family.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the positive feedback you have provided. We sincerely appreciate it.

reviews.text:
I doordashed an order for Christina in this building. It was $2.35 from doordash plus tips. I drove all the way from the fairgrounds area, to Columbia center Blvd. It's a gosh darn law office, no matter the distance, there should have been a tip. There was absolutely no tip. It didn't even cover the gas it took to get there. No wonder the order was sitting at the store for so long when I picked it up. I can see why the reviews for this place are so bad, they don't care about people. I'm a single disabled mom trying to pay for new brakes and food for my kids. Poor people tip more than this. Shameful.

Edit- you are correct, it has nothing to do with your job and everything to do with mine. This is job #3 for me. Not everyone can make the kind of  money your employees do. However, my 'decisions to work three jobs to make ends meet is commendable. It matters. You are paying for a service. Maybe inquiring clients will get an idea based off of these horrible reviews, and confirmation that you are cheap and disrespectful, will keep people from expecting too much. Or maybe you will take this and learn from it. You are not superior to others doing hard work. Doordash wasn't a choice, it's survival and it's hard work. Appreciate the people that provide a service for you. Good luck with your business and next time treat your drivers better. Poor people tip at least 5$, rich neighborhoods at least 8$. Do better. With no tip- we are paying you to deliver to you. That is deplorable.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry to hear about your experience with our building. However, please note  that your personal choice as a doordash delivery driver has nothing to do with our business and serving our clients.  Thank you. ~Management

reviews.text: Mason Pickett has been a huge blessing to my family! He has fought for us through and through but more importantly fought for what is RIGHT! He's gone above and beyond in everything he’s ever helped us with. He has integrity & grit like no other. My family is so grateful for him and his hardworking office in all they do! We recommend him always and will continue to do so! Thank you, wouldn’t even be enough Mason! 🙏🏼
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the positive feedback! We sincerely appreciate it!

reviews.text: Mason Pickett racked up a big bill and didn't communicate. I requested the communications I was being billed for and asked for a meeting.  Instead was sent a nasty email from Mason, stating "if you want more frequent contact when it is not necessary, I can do that, but you are wasting your time and money."  I went through 3 paralegals with each one charging me $250-300 to get up to speed, only to ask me a few days later "who is driving the Jeep".  Almost $9,000 in 8 months to get a no contact order and a motion for the ex to pay the bills on vehicles he had, but they are keeping my bill down.  When I couldn't get explanations on discovery documents they were asking for, he withdrew.  He will not fight for you, just will tell you what you want to hear and not stand behind it. Do yourself a favor and  spend your money with another attorney that won't give you false hopes, answer your questions, and stand behind you.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry that you felt you were not well represented by our firm. We continually strive to ensure our clients receive the best communication and services possible, while being mindful of keeping the costs as low as possible. Unfortunately, there are always extenuating circumstances particularly if the opposing party doesn't cooperate, resulting in more expenses as they are brought before the court. We work within the rules/parameters provided by the local court rules. I just wanted to correct that according to the court records, Mason did not withdraw, you simply chose a different attorney, which is absolutely your right to do so. Again, I am sorry we did not meet your expectations. We wish you the very best and hope you receive the outcome you desire.
Thank you for the positive feedback! It's sincerely appreciated!

reviews.text: Pickett is evil. Even when it’s agreed you have ptsd by the judge, Pickett harasses you, yells at you and acts like a fool. He’s not very good. I mean I won everything I wanted, but my ex who had Pickett lost a total of $1,000,000. $100,000 of that was attorneys fees. 😱 It also took us three years because he constantly cancels court appearance and then they had to be rescheduled. Don’t waste your money here unless you don’t mind losing it all.
reviews.ownerResponse: Being as you were not our client, I understand why you would want to leave a negative review for Mason. Unfortunately without specific details of the case you are referring to, I'm unable to provide you with any clarification. However, please note that the court's schedule is largely outside of any attorney's control. Particularly with COVID and it's aftermath, the court worked within the limitations provided and are continuing to clear the backlog of cases held up during COVID. If your former spouse, who was our client, has any specific issues they are unhappy about, please have them reach out to me directly and I will be happy to further discuss with him/her.

reviews.text: I had Mason Pickett on my case a couple years back. Even during Covid he was on top of things, worked overtime to get my Motion for Revision done when we did not get the results we had hoped with a certain commissioner. I could tell Mason really cared about my case. For financial reasons, I switched attorneys to Don Schirm, who coincidentally just recently moved into this office. Don is very compassionate, understanding, and really has a drive to uphold justice. With these two working together I have no doubts that they will be a powerhouse team. They truly do care about doing what’s right and holding the court commissioners and judges to higher standards in the name of the law. The rest of the staff is constantly working to get things filed, keep everything organized, and respond in a timely manner. The office manager Kelly is on top of everything that’s brought to her attention right away, and Tracy who does discovery has a way of finding things that most people would overlook. I am excited to work with my attorney and this firm again.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the positive feedback. We sincerely appreciate it!

reviews.text: I hired Mr. Defoe a few years ago...he did NOTHING for me!!! He took my money, spoke with the opposing parties attorney, and then fired me as his client. This man is a joke and should be disbarred, legal malpractice is wrong!
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry that you believe your case was not handled as well as you would have wanted. There are many factors that led to the decisions made in your case. I'm happy to further discuss those with you directly.  However, please keep in mind, communication with opposing counsel is necessary in order to move a case forward. My name is Kelly Bennett and I am the General Manager. Customer service is very important to me and to our firm. Thank you.

reviews.text:
8 months to respond to my need to be represented. 15 hours to serve me a liene when I would not pay for service not rendered. I had Pickett as a lawyer for a year. He has good ideas. Decades of experience. But it appears no patience and time to see your case through in a timely manner. Here is my example. I hired him in January. In April my income was cut in half and I asked him to get a court date to get spousal support reduced accordingly.
January the next year, 8 months later we got our court date and reduction.
As a consequence I was not a happy customer and got rid of the firm.
After spending thousands for this ridiculous "service" that actually cost me thousands more with its delay, I refused the last bill of about 500. Hours later I was notified of a lien. Maybe the billing department should run the firm. They are on the ball.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you felt your experience was a poor one. Every family law case can be stressful on both parties. You are welcome to contact me to further discuss your concerns about the specifics of your case.  Customer service is very important to me and to our firm. Unfortunately, we can never guarantee the outcome of any case nor the time frames in which the court works within.  There are many more factors involved. Again, I'm happy to discuss any of your concerns with you. Sincerely, Kelly Bennett, General Manager.

reviews.text: Mason is the best lawyer in the Tri-cities.  He does what he says he will do.  I was in a difficult situation and w/o his services and entire team, I don't think I would of made it.  I got a second chance because of him and I ran with it and have a good life.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are so glad you had a wonderful experience and we appreciate your feedback! Congratulations on the new chapter in your life!

reviews.text:
Defoe must have been the good lawyer in this firm because Steve can't win a case to save his life.
Simple case, but no strategy, we lost and even with low income had to pay alimony for years to come.
If you're going to use this law firm, make sure to stay on top of things because they won't be. Except for sending bills, they're no good.
reviews.ownerResponse: I'm sorry you had a poor experience. However, I believe you must be confused because to clarify, Steve's full name is Steve Defoe. Please contact me to further discuss your concerns. Customer service is very important to me as the General Manager.

reviews.text:
Pickett did a fine job at first, my wife accused me of all kinds of crazy stuff trying to shame me and gain the upper hand but he stood up for me really well. I was very impressed to be honest. After that...

I am not experienced with attorneys but I would expect at the rates I was paying to at least have fair communication from his office. I even had to call and get the info for my hearings (during covid) so I could call in to be present. The emailed bills I received were on the regular but made no sense. I would receive bills by mail that did add up so I would pay them promptly in person. Found out by certified mail over half way through my case that he quit on me. The letter didn't say and when I called I couldn't get a REAL reason as to why he quit. I was told that not only was my $3500 retainer spent (first I knew any of it had been touched) but I also owed nearly $500 more.
Took me a couple of days to get a new lawyer (most don't want to take a case started by another) and in that time I found out that I missed a hearing. Had to pay my soon to be ex's lawyer $500 in fee's because I didn't "appear", would've been nice to have been given the courtesy of knowing. I am sure Pickett's office knew about it because of what my wife said. That's how I found out I owed her lawyer.
Like many others have said on here, he wants your retainer fee, tells you enough to lead you on and drops you once he gets his money. Seems to be a reoccurring theme in these reviews.

I have nothing to say about Defoe, I had no dealings with him or his people.

I was planning on writing a good review because at the start I felt really good with Pickett and his staff. In the end I wish I had taken the advice I read here.

My case was pretty simple and almost done, but it was on to a new client.
If you have a case an need representation or especially have a fight on your hands choose another attorney.

If I was to really dole out GOOD advice I would say this...

As a man in our current legal climate, don't get married in the first place.
I never will again.

Sadly, if you are reading this it's to late.

used Defoe in the past. Planned on hiring him again, receptionist would not help me to ask him a single question before hiring him. All I waned to know is If had run out of time to get child support, if not I was will to pay the fees right away. I thought about sending an email to him since i have it, but whats the point if this is how the business is ran then I'll just hire someone who wants my money.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you had a poor experience. However, our staff is not able to provide legal advice. She offered to schedule you with a consultation with the attorney, which is all she could do. You were requesting legal advice, which she was unable to provide. Please feel free to contact our office at any time to schedule a consultation with Mr. Defoe to address your questions about your case. If you have any other questions or concerns regarding customer service, please contact me directly at: 509-734-8787.

reviews.text: Find a different lawyer. We’ve had them for nearly a year we have been billed weekly upwards of ten grand and they’ve accomplished absolutely nothing we always have to contact them repeatedly before they respond. Family court in this state is already hard enough to go through if you want to spend mass amounts of money to get absolutely no where with no communication no plan of action. then they are for you.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you feel that your case has not progressed to the extent you expected. Each case has its own set of unique facts that determine how long it takes to reach a resolution. As the General Manager, I take customer service very seriously. I would like to discuss your concerns with you directly. Please contact me at kelly@defoepickett.com or by phone: 509-734-8787 to discuss your situation further.

reviews.text: Didnt work on my case at all!  Just racked up a big bill and when I couldn't pay he quit on me.  I requested the communications and got to see just how little was being done on my case.  Almost 3 years of nothing!  I'm representing myself now. He will not fight for you againts GAL's or Oposing council.  He wont even answer emails!  Important ones!  Mason is always on vacation!  He will tell you what you want to hear.  He couldn't get me every other weekend or a parenting plan at all.  Left me at supervised visits.  No mediation.  No trial.  No GAL report!  He let me be abused every hearing.  I never gave a dirty or harrassed anyone. He quit on me in the middle of Covid.  Best thing that could of happened to me.
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry that you were unhappy with our firm's representation. While I am not able to discuss your case in public, there are several issues that should be addressed.  We take customer service very seriously. I am happy to discuss your concerns with you directly. Please contact me at: kelly@defoepickett.com or by phone: 509-734-8787.

reviews.text:
Extremely unhappy with their services.
I paid top dollar for in my opinion extremely low quality service.
It seemed there interest was how much money they could make off me and not serving my interest.
I would NOT recommend this office to anybody for anyting !!!!!!
The only reason I gave them one star is because I cannot give them NO star .
reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you felt you did not receive the outcome you anticipated. Dissolutions are never easy and sometimes both sides feel as if they 'lost'.  I am happy to discuss any specific concerns you have with our firm. Please feel free to contact me at: kelly@defoepickett.com or by phone: 509-734-8787.

reviews.text: If you are a person who likes to win at any cost these are the perfect attorneys for you !

reviews.ownerResponse: I am sorry you had a negative experience with our firm. However, we have no record of you communicating with our firm. If you have a legitimate negative experience with our office, I would be happy to discuss it with you in detail as providing excellent customer service is important. Please contact me. I am the General Manager, Kelly Bennett. I can be reached at: 509-734-8787.

reviews.text: I am not one to normally leave reviews for any business, but I am currently working with Defoe Pickett Law and I can say that everyone there has been wonderful. I have worked with both Steven Defoe and Mason Pickett, and I am confident in their skills at handling my situation. These men are very intelligent at what they do and I am glad I chose this firm to represent me.  Initially, I was very uncertain at what to expect as I have never been to court before. However, the support staff has been very helpful at informing me of everything that I am to expect in this process. In conclusion, Defoe and Pickett, as well as paralegals Hannah and Kelly have been very compassionate and thorough with the work they do. They understand my situation and have been nothing but professional, supportive, and compassionate in what they do.  If you want the right team, I recommend this firm.
Evil lurks within those walls.  No morals at all.

I was very satisfied with Sierra's services during my interview in Ciudad Juárez; everything was in order and easy to find, and she made sure everything was correct. Carolina was also very attentive whenever I called to make a payment or ask questions. Excellent service. Thank you.

AVOID THIS FIRM! In October 2023, Hoxie was formally reprimanded by the Washington State Bar. If I would have know the past behavior, I would have never hired them. $5,000 to absolutely do nothing, staff are incompetent of communication. Over billing, poor communication, negligence, and documents filed late to the courts. First attorney that took my case left the firm with no communication, until I called 2.5 months later to request a case update. Instead of returning my money for negligence they forwarded my case to Hoxie, who also couldn’t even communicate or do what he was being paid for. 2024-2025 nothing was completed for this case, besides headaches and unprofessionalism. DO NOT HIRE THEM!

I rarely give negative reviews, I believe everyone can have a bad day but at the end of that day, how you treat people, especially those looking to you for help in the field you chose shows your true colors. These people are supposed to help vulnerable people navigate through confusing legal matters but they cannot be trusted. I got matched with Christopher Hoxie through my legal insurance, I called several times spanning through weeks, I never received a call back but did end up getting an answer to one of my many calls, they set me up with an appointment over the phone with him, on that day I waited twenty minutes and called them instead, they put me through with Lori because Chris was out of the office during our scheduled meeting, she was very helpful and insightful but unfortunately not covered by my insurance. I called back as my case progressed to a certain point and managed to get a hold of Mr.Hoxie, he was rude, he did not listen to me, it felt like he was rushing me and he spoke to me as if there was no reason to pursue my case. like it was a waste of time and there was no chance I would win. Every question I asked Mr.Hoxie was answered with a statement about him getting paid and deadlines for getting paid, when I asked him questions about my insurance paying him he brushed me off. I do not recommend this law firm.

Mr. Christopher Hoxie has been my lawyer since October 2020 and he has been nothing but awesome! He has held my hand through my divorce with compassion and knowledge, helped me move back home to Louisiana with my kids, and is still showing up in court for things that come up. I would 10000% recommend using Clearwater Law Firm!
Not great
They had moved so the address was inaccurate. When I made contact with them, it was difficult to set an appointment

Before hiring this firm we did all of the leg work. Documented everything for the court in an organized fashion by date and submitted all of the declarations, filled out the paperwork and even submitted to teh court. Hired this attorney because we felt the court would take us more seriously with representation than without given how solid our case is. Literally handed them the case on a silver platter. Even the attorney stated we did an amazing job and "no need to reinvent the wheel". All they had to do was resubmit the paperwork with them as our representation and the other party was to be served that week. This was in October. Did not hear back from them and asked for an update in November. Was told again they were getting ready to file. No update but we were being patient around the holidays for obvious reasons but we get a letter stating the attorney had left in December and that a new attorney was being appointed and would be in contact. Again nothing from the firm but a notice he was going on vacation for two weeks. Nothing after that but an invoice for February for 600 dollars. For what? They hadn't done anything since October/November. We reached out again and for an update and was told the attorney would call us. At our sheduled appt time the attorney never called. I had to call in to the firm 20 minutes into the 30 minute meeting. The lawyer stated he hadnt even had a chance to look at our case and it was dumped on him after the other attorney left. Then why the 600 dollar charge for February? We were promised a summary by end of week. Nothing. Crickets. Now i get an invoice not only charging us for asking for updates, we were charged for teh full meeting with teh attorney that only lasted 7 minutes. We have now reached a point where our case has been stalled so long, the information isnt even relevant anymore and all of our hardwork on this is down the drain. I asked to dispute the charges mentioned above, no response. We will be ceasing our relationship with this attorney and starting over.

My husband was recently approved for his residence. Maria was our paralegal who helped us through the whole process. She is amazing, very helpful, and well-organized. She kept us calm throughout the process and always answered my questions. During my husband's immigration interview, everybody was impressed with the package Maria prepared, which included all his appointments and paperwork needed for the interview at Ciudad Juárez. Although we were a little disappointed that we didn't meet with the lawyer, Maria was always there to help us through the process.
Thank you Maria

This law firm is awful. A friend of mine is too afraid to leave a review in fear of them making things worse, but the fact she paid an arm and a leg for representation only to have them not answer or drag their feet is a bit ridiculous. What kind of firm cares for paying clients like this? Not a good one.

5 times we contacted these people to pickup a check. Told 12:30 went at 1. Still not ready.

Do not go through them.

We are being refunded due to the inability of the lawyers to do their jobs due to constant medial issues. What a joke.

I hope I never need an attorney again, but if it should happen that I need one I would not hesitate to talk to them, they are professional in their work, they answered my questions and helped me in the process without me having to worry. Totally recommended!

Hello please pay close attention to the comments especially the bad ones because these lawyers are a scam they say they will do the work and all they are worried about is the money for that if they are calling you for payments after that they ask for information even if you send it to them they do nothing and they tell you that they are going to charge you for the calls when you say you do not agree. Two payments of ... 2,500.00 total 5 thousand dollars of which for more than two years I was only able to recover 2,500.00 and they did absolutely nothing no court date really pay close attention they are thieves I looked at some comments and I did not believe it and because I did not pay attention this happened.
I have worked with Clearwater Law Group numerous times over the years and have always been very happy with the results! They are professional, knowledgeable & proficient. Definitely recommend!!
Exceptional customer service. I couldn’t be happier with their services.
Helpful law group. All our questions where answered. Everyone is very polite and professional. I would highly recommend there services.

It was a good job for me because I didn't have to go to court, everything was done from home, and it was done in the time frame the lawyer told me to. Excellent work. I highly recommend her. Thank you, lawyer. Lorena Mendoza.
My experience was exceptionally great. Very professional and polite. Greatly appreciated, highly recommend
Amazing firm. Welcoming experience. Very polite and professional.

My experience with Clearwater was absolute trash. I paid them $5000 for them to give me a lawyer that was on her way out of the practice. She didn’t represent me well at all. I had given all the information possible for her to be able to represent me correctly and she did not. I barely spoke with her 3x on the phone. I received emails telling me my case wasn’t as important as other cases as she was getting ready to leave. I got charged repeatedly for having to resend the same emails & attatchments I previously sent to my lawyer. I was sent an email asking if I’d still like representation by them once my lawyer had left and I marked yes and resent it. No one ever showed up to my last court date. I highly do not recommend them to anyone

Thank you
Clearwater Law Group, Lori Mendoza, and your assistant for you service. I went to these guys twice, while the 1st time wasn't to pleasant for me with the many delays because of Covid and bad communication I grew impatient and withdrew. Still in the same situation 2 years later, I decided to give them another shot and it was completely different. Communication was great and all my questions were answered in a timely manner. All scheduled court dates went smooth for my case and was finalized before I knew it with no hassle.

Very professional, they resolved my case.

Very professional. They resolved my case regarding my truck driver's ticket. Thank you very much. I highly recommend them.

If I could give less than 1 start, I would. For full transparency, I was not a client but very close and very involved in the case with someone who was.

They had 3 months and $5000 and failed to filed even 1 thing. Went through the money and then started asking for more when they hadn't accomplished ANYTHING they were retained for. After telling us after they get the information they needed they could file in at most 3 days. They also ghosted for weeks after being asked many times if there was anything else we needed to do and being told no. Then being told "it will be filed Monday" 3 Mondays in a row! They gave no good reason as to why it wasn't filed. Now we have a different lawyer to represent us and the new lawyer said this firm's inaction cost what would have been a very good case for full custody of their children. It's absolutely ridiculous. Being told other cases "take precedents" over the safety of someone's children speaks volumes of what the values are of this law group. Do not use! Avoid at all cost. Especially if it comes to your children. They seem like they just don't care.

Communication is terrible and they are very rude. I wouldn't recommend them to my worst enemy. Moved from person to person with no insight into what they are doing. You have to be the one to consistently call and email before getting any response but it will not be clear. Find someone else who actually cares and wants to help because this is not the law firm that does.

I had a great experience with Clearwater Law Group. Attorney Chris Hoxie and his staff helped me resolve my case professionally. I would highly recommend them. If I ever need legal assistance, I will definitely hire them again.

I had a great experience with Clearwater Law Group. Attorney Chris Hoxie and his staff helped me resolve my case professionally. I would highly recommend them. If I ever need legal assistance, I will definitely hire them again.

Absolutely the worst branch of attorneys and paralegals I have ever come across and a complete waste of time. If I could give them 0 stars I would. I had Christopher Hoxie and he was absolutely awful to work with. I have had a divorce going on for 3 years, and it's only taken this long because I was not well represented even though my ex could not be found. They switched paralegals ALL THE TIME and NEVER communicated. NEVER answered my emails and when I would call, they would NEVER get back to me. Do not waste your time going with this law firm or you will be put in immense debt for absolutely no reason, luckily mine was a legal aid case. The last hearing I had, my attorney didn't even show up too. They don't care about you or your case, they only want money. Stay away.
They didn't do enough for my case.
Ashley has been a pleasure to work with she always answers my questions and gets back to me on a timely basis! I definitely recommend CLG team! Thank you for the service!

Excellent criminal and family law services. My case was handled with great respect, and I felt listened to. They didn't want to help me anywhere, but here they helped me resolve my case. Thank you very much, and I recommend them to anyone who needs a lawyer.

By far the most amazing firm out there. Happy and blessed to have been able to hire this law firm. Walking into my case, I was unfamiliar and uncertain on which way to go and what to do, they were very helpful and guided me through each step of the process. If you want a lawyer who tells it like it is and to be taken care of, this is where you need to go!!

I hired clearwater law group with no previous experience of the court process. Ms Mendoza was very insightful , explained the entire process, the steps we would take during our case and made sure all my questions were addressed during our consultation. Prices are very reasonable considering all the work & effort that they put into their cases. Even when they aren’t in office they are constantly working on cases; yet they still get back to you in a reasonable amount of time when you have questions & concerns. Unfortunately I did have to sell a vehicle to get the ball rolling but in the end it was worth it. My case went exactly as I was hoping. Thank you Ms Mendoza & everyone at Clearwater law group that helped me during my time as your client.

Save your time and money- Do your homework and don't bother with this scam. My brother-in-law used their services and after 6 months of trying to  get results out of them  to do anything for his divorce, all he had was $20k spent for a typo filled complaint with the wrong name/information on it. They can't make their court dates, constantly reschedule hearings because of their mistakes but charge you for the time, and the only time he ever heard from them was the invoices they sent over and over again for absolutely nothing to show. Don't trust their good reviews (honest bad reviews followed by single post 5 star reviews), they are clearly faked to raise their rating and sucker people into using this low-rate unethical company. Check out their other reviews on BBB, bar complaints, and people suing them in court for their shady dealings.
reviews.ownerResponse: This is the second fake review you post.  You did not use our services.  It is ludicrous to state that we spent 20k in 6 months on a divorce case.  This is completely false as well. We know exactly who is posting these, and ask you politely to delete your fake reviews before further action is taken.  We welcome all client reviews based on their experiences with our office. But not when they are fake.  Your entire post sounds incoherent.

reviews.text:
UPDATE: It has now been FIVE years and instead of updates or phone calls, we keep getting invoices instead of results.
OP: Family hired them to help with a property issue FOUR YEARS AGO and after A LOT of money, nothing is done except hearing "oh, we should know in 2-3 weeks." My mother is out a lot of money with nothing to show except a stack of paperwork and much higher blood pressure. These people have no problem in taking thousands of dollars from an elderly woman and not doing a damn thing.
Run. Don't hire these people for anything.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is unfortunate that this is your opinion of our office, and yet you have not been a client of the firm.  Clients are always welcome to hire any attorney of their choice.  If someone is not content with their current attorney they leave and hire a new one.  If your family (you don't specify who which is very broad) is a client of the firm and has questions about their case she is welcome to call; otherwise your basis has no review because you are not a client of our office.

reviews.text: I liked the attention they paid to me and to my questions that I had at the first appointment. They were very kind and responsible in their work.
Professional, compassionate, and efficient Law Firm. I highly recommend Clearwater Law Group to anyone who needs a reliable and experienced lawyer. Very happy with the assistance they provided me.

Very Satisfied with this Law Firm, We got caught up in a tight spot with some legal Issues and they helped my husband and I, Discreet with the client attorney privilege, professional and most importantly very comforting they treated us as if we were part of there family
Very knowledgeable law firm, highly recommend!! Lorena Mendoza is awesome at what she does.

Clearwater Law Group is a top tier law firm. They provide superior legal services to the community. They’re professional, fast, and get the job done. I highly recommend hiring this law firm for your legal needs. You won’t regret it. I certainly don’t.
HIGHLY RECOMMEND this firm. Very professional and efficient staff.

If I could give this firm negative stars I would. To start off my wife used to work at this law firm, they are the most unprofessional group of people she has ever had the misfortune of working with. The owner Lorena Mendoza is a horrible boss. I can recall my wife calling me crying because Lorena would hold staff meetings and speak to her staff with no respect and would even cuss them out as if they are not human. They would give her loads of work, which is fine of course it’s a job, however they’d expect her to finish it all when most of the time she was the only one doing any actual work because the other person supposed to be helping her was her son who wasn’t even there most of the time because the kid was still in Highschool. Furthermore, the attorneys there have no respect for the staff and they felt that since they are lawyers they can just treat and speak to the other staff as they please when little did they know the only reason why the buisness was running was due to the other staff. Eventually my wife left but having insight on how they treated my wife I felt it necessary to caution others and give you an idea on how they will treat there clients also. Save your money spend it on other firms here in TriCities because they are money hungry but never make the client or other human beings a priority.
reviews.ownerResponse: It is disappointing when former employees have to create fake names, and lie to try to hurt someone's business.  When an employer spends countless hours and money on wages that help support your family. This is a fake name and your statements are completely false, which explains the fake name.  You are not a client and have never been a client.   There are always two sides to the story and then there's the truth.  We wish your wife a better outcome with in a new industry (whoever she may be - if she exists), but please note that wherever you are employed attendance is key.

reviews.text: I would not recommend. After I talked with the LLLT on the phone and paid the initial cost, she went on vacation for a week. I never could get her on the phone through the entire process. She does it all by email. She did some assuming and tried charging me more. Papers were misfiled with the court. I was misled. She made sure to let me know that she has many other clients that need her attention and can take up to 2 days to respond to me. But “call the office anytime if you have questions“ …but…”don’t talk to anyone but me”. Overall the way she handle me and my case was not completely professional. If you want non personal and misunderstandings then she’s the one…otherwise just get a lawyer.
reviews.ownerResponse: We are thankful that you chose our office to help you with your legal needs.  Unfortunately, this is not a platform where we can discuss the facts of our legal relationship with you, due to attorney- client privilege.  Unfortunately, some clients prefer email correspondence, and others prefer in person.  Some clients expect to be called back within a few hours and others understand it may take a day or two for non emergencies.  For any business niche, some clients are happy and some are not.  However, we stand by our work and continue to strive to do what is best for our clients. If you have any questions, or concerns, please feel free to reach out to our office.  We thank you for your business and wish you the best of luck.

reviews.text: This is by far the worst law firm if you can even call them that. That I have encountered. I hired them back in January of 2023 and they have only taken my money and done absolutely nothing they are so unprofessional everyone at that office beginning with the so be called Chris Hoxy and Lorena Mendoza the worst people you will ever encounter in your life. They are so shady and they provide no help. They have my case even worse than it was and I had to encounter an embarrassing moment with the judge he was upset and yelling at Hoxy since he didn’t file any of the paperwork he had to do. Besides that he is not even well represented in the court he smells horrible and his clothes look like they’ve never even been washed. You can never get through them via phone. These people are thieves stay away from them they will just take your money and forget about you. My case has now worsen because of these people and I regret hiring them with a passion. All they will do is infuriate you and make you sick to your stomach. Worst joke firm in the Tri-Cities area!! I repeat for your own sanity stay away from them they are not even attorneys to begin with!! I can go on and on about how bad they are!!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for your feedback.  We will take it into consideration and implement your concerns, if change is needed.  Navigating through a legal issue is very difficult, and most of the time when people hire the services of an attorney they do so during a time in their lives when they are extremely upset, and we end up getting the short end of that stick.  Like any business, some clients walk away happy and content with the outcome of their case, and others are never happy.  If you have any further questions or concerns, feel free to contact our office.  We wish you the best of luck.

reviews.text: The staff was very nice. Treated me with lots of respect.
Very satisfy with the professional service I received. My problem got solved on time. Thank you!
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you so much for your feedback and business.  We are very happy that we could help you resolve your matter successfully.

reviews.text: Great
Professional rip off artist's!! 🔥

Levi did an amazing job representing me in a situation where I was unable to find any other legal council willing to take on my predicament. He achieved a fair settlement, and I am so grateful for his guidance and assistance.
Levi is super friendly, very professional, and gets the job done!

Levi Barber is an amazing Lawyer who definitely has your personal interest at hand. He works diligently to obtain ALL the data to present the most accurate case for your most benefit. He resolved my case in a timely manner and was able to negotiate with the opponent to get me more than I had expected - which was a wonderful surprise! If I ever need auto accident case representation again, I will definitely come back to him. A HUGE Thank You!!!!

Best lawyer you could ask for, all three times I have needed a lawyer his honesty and integrity lead me to the best result to be expected for each occasion.

I strongly recommend him for a consult at the very least, thank you Levi you are greatly appreciated.

Levi goes above and beyond!
I started my case with another attorney; he had big promises and had me running around gathering material from the get go (medical records, pictures you name it), after 2 years he told me he could no longer take on the case........
After searching around and making some calls I got wind of Levi. Right away after talking with Levi he went right to work; calling me and keeping me filled in on every step and all the research he was doing. I was super impressed with his communication and work he had done for me. After close to 6 months Levi was able to accomplished success for me, with the best possible outcome!
Long story short dont go with any one else unless you wanna do all the work with no results, Levi is the best in town!
I found the office to be great in every aspect.  They are very friendly, professional, competent and most important very honest and transparent.   I would recommend them to anyone without hesitation.
Amazing work, kept me in the know and helped me greatly with my settlement!

Levi Barber was great to work with. I had spoke to another attorney after my accident in January who wanted me to wait and see how I felt in a month. I went to Levi, told him what happened and he just took over. I never had to worry about anything. He always answered my questions in ways I understood and settled my case for more than I expected. If you're ever in an accident I highly recommend going to Levi.
Highly recommend Levi, great service and great people!!!

Definitely recommend, Levi has been great help during all hard and confusing times, always kept us updated and informed. Staff is polite and professional, always calling back when ever I left a message to call back. I definitely will recommend them to everyone.

I highly recommend Levi Barber!  I went to him in January 2019 after another local attorney had decided not to help me any more, after he had been helping me for over a year. Then after I talked to Levi Barber (which was very easy, because he's a down to earth type of man), Levi Barber took over my accident/injury case, and he gave me my settlement check yesterday, which was much more than I had expected to get. There was a few times that I needed to talk to Levi, but I didn't want to go upstairs to get into his office (because of a painful injury that i had), i either emailed him or called him and left a message, and he answered my email right away or called me back right away if i left him a voice mail. If you've been in an accident and have been injured, and need an attorney, If you get a hold of Levi Barber, then I'm sure that you'll see what I mean, when i say that I highly recommend Levi Barber!
Excelente attention, very professional!

I'm incredibly grateful to Guizar Law firm for their exceptional help with my immigration case. They exceeded my expectations, making the process smooth and fast. A friend recommended them, and I couldn't be happier with my choice. The attorney and their team were responsive and knowledgeable. If you need immigration assistance, this is the firm to trust!

She is as genuine as they come and will help with your situation to the best of her ability! I needed help with my sons legal status and she was able to get me in within 2 days of my original phone call as well as submit my paperwork promptly! After submitting all required forms, she gave me a time frame of 6-8 months to hear back from homeland security, and I heard back within 3months! I received my sons certificate of nationality within 5 days of that and a ss# 2 weeks later! I can not express how happy and thankful I am for the help she provided. And all this at a reasonable price! I would recommended her to whom ever is in need of an immigration attorney!

All along I thought they were working on my case only to find out a year later they had never worked on it at all.  Then they dropped me because I complained of the service I was receiving. I never did get all my paperwork back. NEVER AGAIN

Super sweet people

Smart Law

Don’t upset Teresa or she’ll take her sweet time on your file. Still waiting for closure after two years of “representation” Marcus will back her up and won’t do anything. Very helpful and friendly people. They're very knowledgeable about disability and L&I. Great place to go if you need help with either Social Security or L&I.

During such a difficult time as a loved one's illness, we lacked the resources to handle the complexities of litigation, especially in a case as complicated as ours. They took our case to heart and fought for us. For this reason, we highly recommend them. Their extensive experience, hard work, and dedication will make you feel supported from the very beginning.

Teresa, Twilight, and Marcus did a perfect job at helping me out with my case and they went over my expectations. I highly recommend Smart Law when it comes to your legal issues and what not. Thank you for your services, Smart Law.
I got the greatest service ever. They slaughtered L&I and treated me with the utmost respect. You guys rock. Continue being you
These people truly care about their clients well-being

reviews.text: Had to mark one star because i can't mark zero. The attorney i had was on his first day. Not helpful whatsoever. Fought ssi six years because of them. Not looking for a handout. I paid my taxes and got sick. Do not go to this law firm. Lady named Anne Was rude and laughed at me when I asked for my original paperwork that we traveled all over to get. She said they shredded all original paperwork and were sent on a disk but nothing was on the disk. Today  she said now she can come up with the copies while laughing. My life isn't funny due to them. P.s. attorney looked like he was applying for disability.
They helped answer questions when nobody else could! Very friendly

I'd been fighting for Social Security for 9 years before I contacted Calbom & Schwab. They got me approved without having to appeal the decision. They're very professional and knowledgeable. I highly recommend them.

I contacted this office through their website, using their contact form. I had a simple issue to deal with right now regarding SS disability, and was looking for representation for my review next year. SS had screwed me over so bad, requiring 6 years of legal battles that I do not want to deal with them again without a lawyer representing me. It took the office 3 days to respond, and the message left on my voicemail was somewhat rude and very unhelpful. I was told this lawfirm only works with those filing or appealing "original claims," as the woman who left the message put it; and that I'd "have to face SS on my own" as they don't work with anyone beyond the original claim. Nor could she recommend another attorney. Any lawyer should be able to recommend another lawyer, unless they live in a bubble! It is obvious this group is only in it for the large payouts from SS when they succeed in their appeals. I would recommend looking elsewhere for an attorney who actually cares about people.

Joe Schwab handled my husbands L&I case and won. After my husband passed away, Mr. Schwab got everything taken care of to make sure I received his benefits with no problems and he did it so quickly there was literally no time difference. I received his check exactly when it was supposed to come, no wait. I am very grateful for his kind and professional help.  I would and will recommend them to anyone in the future.

Choosing attorney Moreno was the best decision. Most important quality that I looked is his involvement in the process and not just his extended team. He always answered every question that we had directly. I highly recommend attorney Moreno!

A very good lawyer. He resolved my case in less than a year, and the price was very reasonable. He also resolved my mother's case, which had been with another lawyer for eight years. That lawyer passed away and didn't give my mother a single document; we literally only had the case number from Mexico. We switched to him in September of this year, and he started working to gather more information about the case, etc. By December 16th, he had already secured an appointment for my mother, and she received her green card. I definitely recommend him.

Working with Moreno Immigration Law and attorney George Moreno was one of the best decisions we could have made. Our immigration case was definitely more complex than a standard one, and we knew going into it that it wouldn’t be straightforward. Even so, George handled every part of it with total confidence and professionalism, making the entire process feel far less overwhelming than we expected.

What really stood out was how smooth and effortless he made everything for us. George prepared us thoroughly, gathered every document we could possibly need (and then some), and submitted a perfectly organized application. We believe because of that level of preparation, our case moved incredibly fast our interview was scheduled just 10 days after filing, and my green card was approved about two weeks after that interview. We know that timeline is far from typical, and we truly believe it happened because of George’s experience, attention to detail, and dedication to getting everything right the first time.

George is not only extremely knowledgeable in immigration law, but he’s also patient, friendly, and genuinely invested in his clients. He guided us through every step without ever making us feel rushed or uncertain.

I absolutely and wholeheartedly recommend Moreno Immigration Law to anyone needing immigration help, especially if your case is complicated. George Moreno is exceptional at what he does, and I’m incredibly grateful for everything he helped us achieve.

I had the absolute pleasure of working with Moreno Immigration Law, specifically George Moreno, and I cannot express enough how grateful we are for his guidance and expertise. George is not only incredibly experienced, informative, and intelligent, but he’s also genuinely friendly and approachable, which made such a stressful process feel so much easier. He took the time to explain everything thoroughly, answered all of our questions with patience, and ensured we always felt supported and confident in the decisions we were making.

If you’re looking for an immigration attorney who is truly exceptional at what they do, I highly, highly recommend Moreno Immigration Law. George Moreno is the kind of attorney you want in your corner. He is professional, knowledgeable, and sincerely dedicated to helping his clients succeed.

(This review is in English and Spanish, to inform those who may not be able to read English)
Moreno Immigration facilitated my final steps toward naturalization. I tried to navigate the complicated process without guidance, but I soon realized that would be a very bad idea. In my particular case, I was unaware of certain details from my childhood when we began the process, so I couldn't recall them accurately. Unfortunately, all my information was hidden behind an impenetrable wall of legal jargon. Fortunately, George simplified the process; he knew how to obtain my information accurately and guided me on what we needed to gather. Once we had everything, he filled out the forms and submitted them on my behalf. Now, after 12 years, my long road to naturalization is coming to an end, and if it weren't for George, it would have been even longer.
Highly recommended. If you need genuine immigration advice and support, you won't find better.
Thank you to George and the Moreno Immigration team.

Moreno Immigration made my final steps to naturalization easy, I attempted to traverse the complicated process of Naturalization without advice which I quickly learned would be a very bad idea. With my case in particular there was a few things about my own past I didn't know about since I was a child when we started the process so there was a few things I couldn't remember accurately. Unfortunately all of my information was behind an insurmountable wall of legal jargon, thankfully George made the process simple he knew how to get my information accurately then told me what information we needed to gather on our end, once we had a complete history he filled out the forms and submitted them on my behalf, Now after 12 years my very long path to naturalization is coming to an end and if it were not for George it would take even longer.
Highly Recommended, if you need genuine immigration advice and support then you can't get any better

I am writing to express my sincere gratitude and appreciation for your dedicated efforts and commitment in assisting me throughout the long family reunification process. Your patience and continuous support during this time were invaluable to me and my family.
You handled my case with utmost professionalism, which gave me a sense of reassurance and confidence in your ability to achieve the best possible outcomes.
You provided me with accurate and comprehensive information regarding all the necessary legal procedures, and you patiently and thoroughly answered all my questions.
You offered me support and guidance every step of the way, which helped me overcome this difficult period.
I wish you and your team all the best in your future endeavors, and I highly recommend your services to anyone in need of legal assistance in the areas of immigration and family reunification.
Sincerely,
Amad ABDELSALAM MUSTAFA
