reviews.text:
If I could go back in time, I would have refused this law firm as my public defender. At the time, I was under extreme stress and active coercive control by the actual abuser. I did not feel safe, grounded, or capable of advocating for myself. I was vulnerable, and that vulnerability was exploited.

My attorney was no help. She dismissed my concerns and lied to me by claiming the prosecutor had additional evidence against me that I had not seen, using that claim to pressure me into accepting a plea deal. I was confused, scared, and felt completely helpless. When I asked her to show me this supposed “new information,” she refused and instead told me to request it myself from law enforcement. She actively encouraged me to do so, despite knowing I was under a deadline and that this “new information” never existed.

When I contacted the Sheriff’s Office and Police Department directly, I did not receive any additional evidence because none existed. By the time it became clear there was no new information at all, it was too late. I was forced to plead guilty under pressure, without any actual evidence of abuse against me.

The attorney from Roach & Bishop told me that the so-called “victim” was considered more credible than I was. Why? I called the police for help the same day. I had photographs of my bruises. There was no evidence against me. Instead, law enforcement relied on false character attacks, claiming I “do drugs” and am “crazy.” None of this was true. I have never done drugs in my life.

I was nearly forced into drug court, which would have cost me my job due to the requirements, despite there being absolutely no basis for it. Once the plea was entered, they stopped caring. The case was “done,” and I was left to deal with the lifelong consequences.

Years later, I now understand that I did have a choice. I was told repeatedly that I did not. That realization has been devastating.

I am still living with the aftermath of pleading guilty to something I never wanted to plead to and am not guilty of. The court system failed me. The evaluators involved were corrupt and failed to provide reports they promised, placing me at risk of jail time and even losing my children, all because a partner retaliated after I called the police for help.

They are corrupt. They do not protect victims. They do not care about the truth. And they will not help you.

Do not choose them as if your life depends on it, because when you need them most, they will not be there.

Couldn’t have asked for a better outcome, Nick Jones is very professional and came through for me, couldn’t be happier with the outcome, Thank you Nick Jones, His legal assistant, and everyone at the Roach and Bishop building.
reviews.ownerResponse: Thank you for the 5 stars!

reviews.text:
Takes them so long to get a simple copy of a  parenting done! The paralegal that Mariah had sucked! She spent all my money on her time that she spent doing the job wrong, for example, she charged me for a letter she made for the other party but NEVER sent it! But still charged me, I was charged for changes that I asked for on my parenting plan and they were done wrong.
I’ve asked for a copy of my parenting plan and still haven’t been able to get it after a month and a half and my refund still nothing!
I recommend Mariah just not her paralegal.

I have come here twice to retain a lawyer and Both times I have retained Ms Lujano as my legal representative. She has shown such diligence in her work that when need be, i came back.

She is knowledgeable and great at what she does and her office has always been courteous, respectful, and easy to get a hold of.

Her legal assistant is also due many thanks and i have nothing but nice things to say about the whole team at Roach & Bishop. They’ve made a complex issue very easy for me to handle and have done so much to secure the safety of my family. I thank them all.

If you need your matters handled,
Roach & Bishop is where to go.

Thank You Mariah.

reviews.text:
Eamonn Roach is an outstanding immigration attorney! He is professional, knowledgeable, and dedicated!

If you need an immigration attorney, Eamonn is the one you want to have by your side. He is extremely knowledgeable and experienced in immigration matters.  Eamonn is attentive and dedicated, along with the rest of his staff.   Emails to Eamonn and his legal assistant were always answered quickly.  He and his staff are there every step of the way to guide you through.  Eamonn is easy to talk to and puts you at ease while navigating what felt like a very complicated process.  Eamonn was able to assist our family to navigate the process, starting in 2017,  when my son and daughter-in-law were married, and ending in 2022, guiding our family to obtain a Certificate of Naturalization for our daughter-in-law, who was a DACA recipient. Even though the whole process felt daunting for our family, Eamonn and his staff helped us achieve our ultimate goal-Citizenship!  Eamonn’s is top-notch and will help you every step of the way.  We highly recommend Eamonn for any immigration matters!
reviews.ownerResponse: Diane, we are so honored to be a part of your families journey to citizenship.We appreciate your review and recommendation. Thank you for praising our healthy communication and process!

reviews.text: I have known this firm for 8 years. It’s been a great pleasure to have them on my side. They helped me and my wife throughout my citizenship journey starting from H1B visa. They have been very professional, pleasant, and courteous. They have worked extra hard to ensure my success. Special thanks for all your help over the years!!

reviews.text: I called and they transferred me. I heard somone pick up then hang up on me. I called back and it went straight to voicemail. The third time it just kept ringing. I wouldn't recommend this place.

When weighing the pros and cons 3 seemed fair. I was given adequate representation. The service was less than impressive but they let me make payments that was nice. You'd think for $6k, in 3 years I'd get to see the inside of the office at least once. The only time we talked was right before each court appearance where i was given my options and only had a few seconds to decide. His assistant never contacted with precise information, only general guidelines and it was up to me to figure out what parts applied to me and then navigate the rest on my own. But the job was done and that i can't argue. That's why it's not a one or two star but I felt like I was just a bargaining chip for his other cases more than anything else. It was a rough time during COVID so that could have been a major factor. Either way no one tried to inspire confidence, reassure me, or communicate any detail. Only glimpses for a few seconds every few months.
Great Service. I Am really thankful to Mr. Roach group to help me get my green card .. they were always on top of my case.
reviews.ownerResponse: Varinder, we are so happy to help you with your immigration case! Thank you for trusting us with your case!

reviews.text: Could be 5 star. Idk yet we'll see.

Great firm, they put the client first and are experts are true professionals in the law.  Brian was fantastic to work with, very knowledgeable and personable.  Highly recommend this practice!

Very good sevice, very responsive, professional. I applied for my husband in  Oct 2016, he came to US in Dec 17, he just became citizen last week.  They were on top of it all getting paperwork in early.  They will work with you to the end of your process. I highly recommend this firm.

Eamonn roach and his team did a great job at handling my legal matters . My family and I have been using their services for 20+ years and we are greatly satisfied .With his legal help we were all able to get our green cards and then successfully were able to receive American citizenship. Eamonn is Very professional and efficient when it came to handling our cases . If anyone is looking for help with immigration matters I highly recommend using roach and bishop !

We loved working with Eamonn Roach and his staff. The team is professional, helpful, communicatively efficient and friendly. We are very pleased with the way we were guided to my citizenship. If anything to do with immigration ever crosses our path again, we will for sure be back to this office.

Cockroach attorney at law. These guys are the worst. They continued my case 11 times. Twice they didn’t even tell me and I drove from Spokane and my attorney had already continued my case with the public defender. He didn’t even show or tell me. Dude charged me 7gs and did nothing. I got ripped off. Don’t do the same.
J.Bishop is an amazing lawyer and Heidi is totally awesome and on top of the laws and always available to help you out. I totally love this office!!

Good

I got into a car accident a while ago and fractured my spine, I moved to Washington from Hawaii and have no family here. Nathan Henry was recommended to me. He took care of everything. He keep me updated and was able to save me a ton of money. He made the process very easy to understand and I felt very supported. I would recommend him to anyone that is needing representation. I was treated like family and that is huge to me.

there are not enough ways to say thank you to Bill and his team. from the moment my auto accident case opened i was guided through the process without being overwhelmed and double checking work, bill is very efficient. it was really nice to know i didn’t have anything to worry about on the legal side while i was in process of healing myself. my case was a very long process and not once did i doubt i wasn’t getting taken care of the proper way. thank you Bill, for everything you’ve done for me. i cannot thank you enough.
Levi Barber Did so amazing with my boyfriend car accident case he took his time to make sure everything was done right. He got him a settlement more than expected Thank You 🙏 so much Levi.
